listing_name: Bear's Den Gatlinburg Tn.
description:
This secluded country cabin is located in the Historic Arts & Crafts Community. Only 5 miles from Downtown Gatlinburg and 9 miles from Pigeon Forge. It has access to a private 2 acre lake. A quiet and peaceful cabin for you and your family to relax and unwind.

The space
This cabin is close to attractions and restaurants. Secluded but only 10 minutes to Gatlinburg. This cabin has all the amenities that will make your stay comfortable and relaxing.
Amenities include:
Cable TV, high speed wi-fi, full kitchen, hot tub on outside private deck off lower queen size bedroom, Jacuzzi tub in upstairs queen size bedroom, full kitchen, washer/dryer and 2 bathrooms.

Guest access
The entire cabin.

Other things to note
You will want to stop at the grocery store to pick up essentials. We do not stock food items and only a starter supply of toiletries.

listing_name: Just For2;Borders GSMNP;Allergen-Free;Very Private
description:
Get close to nature and away from the crowds! Smoky Mt High, exclusively designed for a couple, is the perfect mountain retreat! Privately owned and operated, Smoky Mt High offers personal, thoughtful touches throughout including a chilled bottle of wine waiting for your arrival! ! Our large, one bedroom cabin borders the GSMNP and is close to many of great trailheads in the park. Smoky Mt High truly offers an amazing experience that keeps our guests coming back year after year!

The space
From the moment you arrive at this lovely cabin, a rustic, romantic atmosphere will surround you. Enjoy preparing meals in the fully equipped kitchen. The living area is a wonderful place to spend time as you snuggle up by the stone gas fireplace (operational October -March ) on the leather sofa or comfy recliner and enjoy a DVD on the Blue-ray player from our collection, a movie via Netflix, or your favorite TV show on the 50 inch flat screen TV. The main level also features a game room with a full size pool table and game table. Games, playing cards and puzzles are provided for your convenience. Relax and enjoy the beautiful views from the log rockers or the porch swing. The lower level provides a romantic setting for two: Watch your favorite movies from the comfortable king size log canopy bed on the 40 inch flat screen TV above a second cozy gas fireplace (operational October-March). A private area with Jacuzzi tub is just off the bedroom, as well as a large master bath with an over sized shower. There is a lower deck off the bedroom area where you will enjoy spending time in a large inviting hot tub while enjoying the lights of Gatlinburg and Pigeon Forge by night and the aerial tram and beautiful mountain views by day.
You can plan a private cookout for two on the park-style charcoal grill located near the entry of the cabin. If you choose to go out for dinner, you will find excellent dining choices just a few miles down the mountain in downtown Gatlinburg or at Ober Gatlinburg. You may choose to drive a very short distance and park at Ober Gatlinburg and ride the scenic Aerial Tram down the mountain to dine or shop in the many unique shops downtown. As a member of Chalet Village Owner's Club please use our membership card provided for access to three club houses on the mountain, each with pools (seasonal), and recreational areas. This card also offers discounts at numerous attractions and restaurants in the Gatlinburg area. Please comply with our no pet policy, our two person maximum occupancy policy, and remember that this is a smoke free cabin.
Smoky Mountain High Cabin will prove to be a perfect location for your Smoky Mountain vacation
Please visit our two other Airbnb listings. All three of our listings are 1 bedroom chalets in the Chalet Village area of Gatlinburg. If you like to travel with other couples our three chalets are a great choice!
airbnb.com/rooms/42511645
airbnb.com/rooms/21187184

Guest access
Our guests have private access to all of the cabin amenities listed as well as privileges offered at three Chalet Village Owner's Club locations including pools (seasonal), tennis courts, and game rooms. Travelers also have access to all areas of the Great Smoky Mountains National Park including more than 80 hiking trails, numerous picnic areas and various seasonal programs and presentations offered free to visitors to the park by park rangers. Stop by Sugarlands Visitor Center for information about hiking trails, maps, and scheduled park sponsored events and programs.

Other things to note
We strive to include everything that our guests could desire at Smoky Mountain High Cabin. Sitting high atop the ridge, it offers views of Gatlinburg, Pigeon Forge and the Tram to the north and the majestic towering Mt LeConte through the bordering National Park to the east and south (especially November-March when the leaves are off of the trees). We provide a detailed notebook for your convenience and brochures describing the many activities in Gatlinburg, Pigeon Forge and the Great Smoky Mountains National Park available during your stay. We are high atop Ski Mountain near the ski resort, Ober Gatlinburg, so it is important to note that you will be traveling on mountain roads to reach our elevation. The roads are in good shape, well-traveled, well-maintained by the city of Gatlinburg and do not require a 4WD vehicle unless a winter weather event occurs before or during your stay. Should roads become snow-covered, 4WD will be necessary to navigate the mountain roads. If you are lucky enough to experience the beauty of a Smoky Mountain snowfall, you will enjoy the gorgeous snow-capped mountain views and fun that await you! Ober Gatlinburg Ski Resort offers skiing, snowboarding, tubing and year round ice skating and is just a mile away!

listing_name: Luxury Cabin • Master Suites • Swimspa • Gameroom
description:
Newly built cabin in the Great Smoky Mountains. With accommodations for up to 12 guests, this unique mountain retreat offers 4 suites, a sleeping loft, 4 full bathrooms, and 3 half bathrooms.

This 4,000 sqft cabin is outfitted with a spacious living and dining area, fireplace, fully equipped kitchen, game room, patios, balcony, and a deck, where you can gather around the fire pit, grill, TV, or heated swim spa. With access to Chalet Village Resort: pools, tennis courts, and clubhouses.

The space
Our cabin provides you access to Chalet Village Clubhouses, including pools, tennis courts and clubhouses. Check out: chaletvillageownersclub

Other things to note
We offer a daily cleaning service which includes making-up the beds and cleaning the kitchen area for an additional $45 the day. If you're interested in this service please let us know once your booking is confirmed via the AirBnB chat and we will make the necessary arrangements.

All of our cabins have access to the Chalet Village Club which include tennis courts, swimming pools, game rooms and a gym. Club access cards will be at the cabin for your use and enjoyment.

listing_name: Big Luxury Gatlinburg Cabin | Hot Tub | Fire Pit
description:
Experience ultimate comfort at Roaring Fork Lodge, a 6,300 sq ft luxury Gatlinburg cabin just ½ mile from downtown! Relax in the hot tub ♨️, gather by the fire pit🔥, or enjoy the movie theater, game room, and panoramic Smoky Mountain views. Sleeps 20 with 4 floors of space, king suites, bunk rooms & large decks. Owner-managed for spotless care & personal service — your perfect retreat!

♿️ Easy “3 Step” Main Level Access for Limited Mobility Guests. Read main description below for more details.

The space
🏔️ Roaring Fork Lodge | Luxury Gatlinburg Cabin | Hot Tub | Theater | Game Room

Welcome to Roaring Fork Lodge, a 6,312-sq-ft luxury Gatlinburg log home crafted from northern white cedar and designed for unforgettable Smoky Mountain gatherings. This four-story Adirondack-style retreat sleeps up to 20 guests, offering unmatched comfort, privacy, and stunning views — all just ½ mile from downtown Gatlinburg and the Great Smoky Mountains National Park.

✨ Why Guests Love Roaring Fork Lodge ✨

✦ Owner-Managed Care: Personally hosted by Chris & Sarah — hands-on service, spotless cleaning, and personal attention you won’t find with large companies.
✦ Luxury Design: Featured in Log & Timber Home Living Magazine (June/July 2023)! Built from Canadian white cedar logs, with granite counters, hickory floors, and handcrafted finishes.
✦ Unmatched Space: 6,300 sq ft indoors + 5,000 sq ft of covered outdoor decks with panoramic Smoky Mountain and city views.
✦ Prime Location: Quiet road just above downtown; walk or drive to Anakeesta, Ripley’s Aquarium, and trolley stops.
✦ Ultimate Entertainment: Private movie theater (120″ screen), game room, pool, air hockey, shuffleboard, skee-ball, foosball, and arcade games.
✦ Hot Tub ♨️ & Fire Pit 🔥: Relax under the stars, roast s’mores, and watch fireworks from your deck.
✦ Outdoor Living: Fire pit area, hammock posts (bring your own hammock), picnic & cornhole yard — bordered by the national park for frequent bear 🐻 and wildlife sightings.
✦ Gourmet Kitchen: Gas range, granite counters, and a 10-ft walnut dining table (seats 12 + bar 5 + outdoor 8).
✦ Spacious Sleeping: 2 King suites, 2 Queen rooms, 2 bunk rooms + sofa beds and roll-outs — sleeps 20 comfortably.
✦ Holiday Décor: Beautifully decorated from mid-November to mid-January.
✦ No Pets 🚫: Ideal for families and allergy-sensitive guests.

♿️ Easy “3 Step” Main Level Access for Limited Mobility Guests

Enjoy a stress-free stay with convenient main-level access from the upper parking area. There are just 3 six-inch steps up onto the front porch of the cabin, and once inside, everything you need is on the main level. The huge kitchen, living room, dining area, spacious outdoor deck, hot tub, and the primary king bedroom with ensuite bath (w/ walk in shower and bubble jet tub) are all accessible without navigating the stairs. While the cabin is not ADA-compliant, this layout is ideal for guests with limited mobility or anyone who prefers easy, step-free living during their stay. Many families rent our cabin so loved ones with limited mobility can enjoy a comfortable stay on the main level without needing to use stairs.

🛏️ Sleeping Arrangements
✦ Loft (4th Floor) – King suite w/private bath + futon (3 guests)
✦ Main (3rd Floor) – King suite + queen sofa bed (4 guests), living area + fireplace + kitchen + deck access
✦ Second (2nd Floor) – 2 Queen rooms, bunk room (twin/queen), fold-out beds (6–8 guests), pool table + fireplace + laundry
✦ Bottom (1st Floor) – Bunk room (4), futon (2), theater room + game room with pub bar + yard access

🏡 Amenities
✦ 6,312 sq ft | Sleeps up to 20 (max) ✦ 4 Floors ✦ 10–15 Car Parking ✦ Downtown Gatlinburg location
✦ Hot Tub ♨️ ✦ 2 Fireplaces 🔥 ✦ Movie Theater 🎥 ✦ Game Room 🎮 ✦ Fire Pit 🔥
✦ Granite Counters ✦ Hickory Floors ✦ Smart TVs (75″, 65″, 50″) ✦ High-Speed Wi-Fi via Spectrum
✦ Endless Hot Water System ✦ Full Laundry Room ✦ Outdoor Dining + Grill ✦ Hammock Posts
✦ Google Home Voice Assist ✦ Whole-Home Security System ✦ 24/7 Local Maintenance

🌄The Perfect Gatlinburg Location

✦ ½ mile to downtown Gatlinburg ✦ 1 mile to National Park Entrance
✦ 2 min to Stoplight #3 ✦ 3 min to Food City Grocery ✦ 5 min to Arts & Crafts Community
✦ 15–20 min to Dollywood & Pigeon Forge 🎢

Enjoy the best of both worlds — close to town yet perfectly private. Watch the city lights twinkle below while relaxing in total mountain serenity.

🔒 Security Notice
Exterior cameras monitor parking areas, yards, porches, decks, and entry areas only — never private spaces or indoor spaces — used solely for guest safety. By renting our property you understand and agree to our use of exterior surveillance cameras.

📅 Book Your Stay
Whether it’s a family reunion, corporate retreat, or luxury Smoky Mountain getaway, Roaring Fork Lodge offers the perfect blend of space, sophistication, and scenic beauty. Book your stay today and experience the pinnacle of Gatlinburg luxury — where every detail is crafted for comfort and unforgettable memories.

We DO NOT allows pets at this property.

Guest access
Door and alarm codes will be provided electronically, not later than 3 days before your arrival date.

Other things to note
After booking we will send you a copy of our standard rental agreement and request your electronic signature via text message. We require the rental agreement to be signed after your booking is complete, and before you arrive at our property on the specified dates. If you disagree with any part of our rental agreement before you execute signature, you are more than welcome to cancel your reservation at our property penalty free, as long as it is within the first 48 hours of placing your booking.

listing_name: Apple Tree Cabin It's Perfect!
description:
The Apple Tree House is nestled in the Arts & Crafts Community just 10 min. from the Gatlinburg strip, 15 min. from Pigeon Forge or 6 minutes from Rocky Top Sports World. This cozy cabin offers amenities & privacy. Enjoy a relaxing dip in the hot tub, an exciting game of air hockey or romance by the fireplace! Great for getting away from it all! There is a security camera for exterior only for the driveway. I’ll be happy to send a picture of what can be seen

The space
Enjoy your stay from the moment you pull into the driveway. The cabin has a mountain look and feel with all the amenities you want. Professional housekeeping and great amenities from the gel fueled fireplace, air hockey table to the hot tub. All linens are provided and the kitchen is equipped, living room offers a recliner, sofa, chairs plus 40 inch flat screen TV and gel fueled fire place with all fuel provided! The cabin has vaulted ceilings and wood beams to create that cozy cabin feel. Large master bedroom has an orthopedic king bed, flat screen TV, en suite bath and walk in closet. Second bedroom/game room has flat screen TV, Wii and Play Station, movies, air hockey table and large doll house with all the fun accessories! The laundry room has full size washer and dryer. Guest bath is large just off of the great room. The dining table seats 6 and the kitchen is fully equipped with full size appliances, dishes, small appliances and cookware. ROKU devices on TV's so you can keep up with all your streaming series. Exterior security camera to the front of the house and driveway

Guest access
Upon booking the cabin I ask for your email address. I email a direction and key code document that gives easy directions to the property. There is an electronic lock and a code is provided to access the cabin. There are no gates to open and the property has a long gravel driveway for ample parking. Enjoy the entire 1 acre property with a private hot tub. Small weddings or gatherings possible with owner's approval. Picnic table, fire pit and park style grill are provided.

Other things to note
King mattress in the master bedroom is an orthopedic mattress. Super comfortable memory foam mattress in the guest bedroom. listing_name: Walk to the Parkway - Cabin with Private Hot Tub!
description:
Experience Gatlinburg! The Redwood Retreat is a remodeled historic home in the heart of Gatlinburg.

Located a short 4 minute walk from the parkway, this well appointed 2 bedrooms, 2 bathroom cabin sleeps 7 or more people and has a private hot tub. It is an easy walk on level ground to the Convention Center, Ripley's Believe It Or Not, The Space Needle, The Sky Bridge, and so much more. The Aquarium, Anakeesta and the Great Smoky Mountains National Park are all about a 15 minute walk.

The space
Experience Gatlinburg! The Redwood Retreat is a recently remodeled historic home in the heart of Gatlinburg’s most popular area.

Located a short distance from traffic light 8, this luxuriously appointed cottage that sleeps 7 or more people is an easy 4-minute walk, on level ground, to the Convention Center, Ripley’s Believe It Or Not, Old Smoky Moonshine, Starbucks and everything else the main parkway of Gatlinburg has to offer. You can even walk to the Great Smoky Mountains National Park in about 15 minutes.

Enjoy a Private Theater with a 70' HDTV, true surround sound, Xbox One, Blue Ray DVD player, Charter Cable, and Netflix. Bring your favorite games and movies; the theatre will blow your mind. If you're a gamer you will love being able to use the sound clues coming through surround sound to navigate your games. This dedicated theater room has two walls covered in rich, sound attenuating satin curtains and you'll enjoy all your media from a reclining leather sofa.

From the Private Theatre, you can walk into the compact spa-like master bathroom with a huge 2 person heated, jetted tub that has 2 showerheads. The next door opens into the Master Bed Chamber which welcomes you with a king-size Kings Down mattress, piles of puffy pillows, and a clean, cozy comforter all piled into a sturdy, solid wood sleigh bed. Of course, there is a 40' flatscreen HDTV with cable, Netflix and a Blueray DVD player tucked into the corner.

The doors in this part of the house are arranged such that the Theatre, Master Bath and Master Bed Chamber can be isolated from the rest of the house to make a truly indulgent Master Suite. With this set-up, parents can enjoy their own retreat while the kids use the front Living Room room to watch movies. Alternatively, the Master Bathroom and Master Bed Chamber can be isolated so any guest can use the Private Theatre. If the kids are old enough, they can walk 4 minutes to the arcades and Lazer Tag arena at the Space Needle and Ripley's Believe it or Not while parents unwind in the Master Suite.

As you exit the Master Bed Chamber you can turn right into the Bunk Room where there are 4 wonderfully comfortable, memory foam mattresses; two full size and three twin size. Here too, there are piles of pillows for everyone and a 40' flatscreen HDTV with cable, Netflix and a Blueray DVD player. If you happen to have an extra guest there is a spare mattress in the trundle under one of the bunk beds.

Across the hall from the Bunk Room is the fully renovated main bathroom. From the hall, you will also see the fresh and fun kitchen with beautifully refinished original cabinetry, stainless steel appliances, and a huge dining room table that can seat 6-8 people. The kitchen is appointed with a standard 12 cup coffee maker, an electric kettle, 12 sets of dinnerware (1 set includes: dinner plate, small plate, bowl cup, glass, spoon, fork, and knife), 8 wine glasses, 8 beer mugs, a stovetop cook set, basic bake-ware, casserole dishes, pizza pan, blender/food processor, mixer, toaster, large pitcher and general cooking utensils. The Kitchen has a door into the Theatre room, and adjacent to the kitchen are the washer and dryer and a space big enough to set up a queen air-bed if you are coming with a lot of guests (we don't supply any air beds).

The last door out of the hallway brings you to the first room in the house; the luxurious living room. Here you will find an original stone hearth outfitted with a gas fireplace, a 42' flat-screen TV with true surround sound, and huge leather sectional with 3 recliners in it. What may strike you most is what you see out the front window; the space needle, the Sky Park, and the mountain the Sky Park sky lift climbs. From here you really begin to understand just how close you are to all that makes Gatlinburg one of the most popular destinations in the United States. It's all just 5 minutes away, but from inside one of Gatlinburg's original homes, you still feel secluded in this quiet neighborhood.

Outside you'll enjoy the large hot tub with an easy-to-use cover lifter and a patio with a charcoal barbecue, two tables, and seating for 8. With the location of the Redwood Retreat, we are sure you will really appreciate having private, off-street parking for 3-4 cars. There are paid parking lots further from downtown than this! The gently sloping ramp going to and from your car means the only time you'll have to lift your rolling bag is to get it out of the car. Your first adventure doesn't have to be getting your luggage into the cabin!

The hot tub is about 40 feet from the door, we chose this location for a couple of reasons. First, for the view toward Gatlinburg. Second, when it's firefly season, the fireflies in the trees behind the house and around the jacuzzi are magical. Finally, the ivy-covered stone walls of this hot tub alcove have a historic charm that we just can't get enough of. We arranged the hot tub cover lifter so that when it's open, the cover itself provides privacy from the neighbors to the south. Please bring a bathing suit as this hot tub is not isolated enough for nude bathing. The hot tub water is changed, the tub cleaned and new chemicals added after every guest.

Beneath the surface of this home are the systems that you should never have to think about: The new 2 stage heating and cooling system with brand new ductwork and state of the art air filtration will quietly keep your air clean and comfortable. Meanwhile, the top of the line tankless water heater provides unlimited hot water; meaning every-body can take showers at the same time and all guests can cleanup without the last few having to suffer through a chilly shower. Please note this is not an 'instant' water heater; the hot water still has to travel through lengths of pipe to get to your faucet, so it can take 30 seconds to a minute to flow hot. Each bathroom has a ventilation fan that will automatically turn on when the humidity increases and an auxiliary heater so you can stay toasty warm after your shower.


Historic Charm: This home was built in 1934, throughout its life it has been a private home, an overnight rental, and a long-term rental home. At one point the head of Gatlinburg's Garden club lived here, we suspect she planted the tree you will see about a foot outside the front window. Originally there were a number of homes just like this one in this neighborhood. Most were demolished but one was so well-loved that it was detached from its foundation, loaded on a truck, and taken to the owners' larger property in Sevierville. This one has survived. Its former owner kept it well maintained so when we bought it we were able to live in it as our primary home for a year.

During that year, we learned what we loved and what we wanted to change; though the home was well maintained it was also very outdated with a lot of accumulated wear and tear. After walking downtown for coffee, food, and entertainment almost every day for a year, we decided that this home was something we needed to share with others who love the Smoky Mountains and Gatlinburg. We bought another historic home in Sevier County, made it t livable, and moved in. Then the work on the Redwood Retreat work began. Months and many dollars later it was finally ready for your arrival. We did our best to maintain the historical charm of this cottage while making it a luxury getaway fit for discerning travelers.

Getting back to the Tree:
It took me months to figure out what kind of tree this is because it's not a common tree of the Smoky Mountains. It is a Coastal Redwood. It is the same tree that has huge parks dedicated to it in California. It just so happens that the Smoky Mountains, with their high humidity and frequently misty conditions, provide a great climate for the Coastal Redwood. Needless to say, we think the tree is just wonderful. It will eventually encroach upon the house, and that is just fine as there are plenty of techniques that we can use in the future to maintain the house alongside the tree; for now, we just want you to be able to enjoy the 'Redwood Retreat' tucked beneath its boughs.

Guest access
Our contactless coded entry system provides a unique access code for every guest. Your access instructions will be e-mailed to you a few days before you arrive. No driving to pick-up keys or waiting on a tired clerk to get your access information to you!

9. What type of internet do you provide? - We provide unlimited gigabit internet with wi-fi.

Guest access
The guests will be renting the whole condo unit.

We will message the address, door code and directions to you at least 2-5 days prior to your check in date.

listing_name: Great Views of Smokys
description:
Located in Gatlinburg near park entrance. This cabin is close to all attractions in Gatlinburg, Pigeon Forge, and Sevierville. High speed WIFI (400 Mbs+), Smart TVs in every room. Game room with Pool Table, Hot Tub, Washer & Dryer. Fully Equipped Kitchen, Dining Room, and Living Room. Wood Burning Fireplaces in Living Room and Game Room

Pets allowed. Prior approval additional pet fee.

Please read and agree to Rental Agreement in Other Things to Note.

The space
Who wants to stay in a motel or condo with a view of the parking lot when you are on a vacation to the mountains. For less than the price of a single condo downtown, you get a whole house in the mountains with stunning views of the Great Smoky Mountains.

Number 6 Cabin is a mile away from the National Park entrance and Downtown Gatlinburg. Twenty minutes to Dollywood or thirty minutes to Pigeon Forge/Sevierville Attractions and Shopping.

There are two bedrooms on the upstairs floor. The front bedroom (with the killer view and balcony) has a king size bed. The back bedroom has two queen beds. There is a full bathroom on the upstairs floor. There are smart TVs in both bedrooms

The bedroom on the main floor has a king bed. There is a full bathroom on the main floor. There is a fully equipped kitchen, Large dining room, and living room on the main floor. There is a large deck with killer views and a smaller deck with the hot tub and grill. There is a wood burning fireplace in the living room. There is a large smart TV over the fireplace and a smart TV in the bedroom.

There is a sleeper ottoman in the bar area on the lower floor that converts into a very comfortable full size bed. There is a full size bathroom on the lower floor and a full size washer and dryer. The game room has a full size pool table and plenty of comfortable seating. There is a wood burning fireplace in the game room. There are good views of the mountains from the game room windows. There is a large smart TV over the fireplace and a small smart TV in the bar area.

Guest access
You have access to the entire cabin. There is parking for three vehicles. Please let us know if you plan to have more than three vehicles and we will work with you to find additional space.

Number 6 Cabin has an electronic door lock. You are assigned a personal door code. You are free to come and go as you wish. Check in is any time after 4pm. Check out time is 11am.

Other things to note
We no longer provide any cable or satellite service. The cost was becoming prohibitive and we found that very few guests were actually using it. There are Smart TVs in every room. These TVs have many free streaming channels. In addition, they have all of the usual apps (Netflix, HULU, Prime, etc.) that you can log onto with your subscriptions. Additionally, the televisions support casting from Apple and Android devices.

Rental include access to the Chalet Village Owners Clubs. These clubs have pools (Labor Day through Memorial Day), exercise rooms, and playgrounds. There is also a very large meeting / reception space available for rent at a very reasonable rate.

Please note that this cabin has a steep driveway. For 95% of people this is not a problem, but some folks panic when they see it. It is only 25 feet long, but it's pretty steep. As long as you have good tires, you should be able to make it with no problem. There is parking for 3 cars at the top and you can turn around and drive down. We have had to drive a couple of guests cars up for them just to prove to them that their cars can make it. After that they are able to go up and down with no problem. The only cars that won't make it are cars that are really low to the ground. There is a steep angle where the driveway meets the road. Other than low riders and sports cars, most any other vehicle will not have a problem.

We allow up to 2 reasonably size dogs (40 pounds). There is a $75 pet fee. Prior approval of pets is required. Before booking, let us know if you are bringing pets.

listing_name: Practical Elegance
description:
This is our FULL TIME RESIDENCE. We share our home with only one couple or single guest at a time, treating them like long term friends. One, well-behaved, pet is welcome at this Bed & Breakfast.

Replete with contemporary rustic furniture and sculpture, our home sits a stone's throw from Roaring Fork Creek just outside the Great Smoky Mountains National Park (GSMNP).

An easy walk to Gatlinburg's 'strip' and easy access to the Park puts our guests in an unparalleled and unique situation.

The space
Unlike many homes at the top of steep, winding hills, we are located across the street from a major stream just below the GSMNP. The sound of cascading water is ever present and soothes our guests to a thorough state of tranquility. We invite you to relax, unwind and enjoy.

Our home, even in winter, is accessible by almost every vehicle. All those capable of reaching Gatlinburg can arrive at our home. No four-wheel drive vehicle required. Parking available for only one vehicle.

Much of the furniture in the home has been created by yours truly. Examine the exquisite details and craftsmanship. Our line of furnishings has been labeled ‘Contemporary Rustic’. Appropriate for any interior, many are fashioned from solid, virgin timber harvested in the 1920's. No pesky hardware. Mortise and tenon construction is the norm.

If you are interested in a piece herein, many are for sale. Our guests receive a preferred status on pricing. We accept commissions from our stock of semi-finished lumbers. Define a space to fill, give us a budget, name a specie of wood and we will provide a sketch to define what could become your newest heirloom. Contact us directly for more information.

Guest access
The front door opens into a great space downstairs…

An eat-in chef quality kitchen is fully appointed and is open to our guests’ use. Coffee maker, blender, microwave and dishwasher makes this a home away from home.
At the other end of the first floor, two couches allow for conversation, witnessing a televised sporting event on the large HD television or a quiet interlude of relaxation. Board games are available. Spend some time at the Chess board. We often share this space with guests in order to plan activities.

A powder room is available during the revelry, halfway down a short hall.

Upstairs, our home has one bedroom available.

The master suite, to the right atop the stairs, includes a two-person whirlpool, a king size bed, HD television, exterior door to the porch. The upper porch is the perfect place to enjoy an early morning cup of coffee or nightcap.

Artwork and sculpture adorn the home. The landscape has been described as the best in the neighborhood, no matter the season. A well inventoried grocery is just over a mile away, to your right, on the Parkway. As this is our 'permanent residence' you will find many herbs, spices, and condiments. Feel free to use them. We keep them fresh enough for our own use! There is limited amounts of refrigerator and freezer space for your convenience.

During your stay
THIS LISTING IS FOR A SHARED HOUSE, EXCEPT FOR OUR PRIVATE QUARTER SUITE.

Arrangements for breakfast can be made (see menus below). Following a nutritious (and delicious) breakfast, prepare for your adventure in the GSMNP. We are avid hikers, one of us prefers the uphills, one the downhills. Our equipment for outdoor activities are available to guests. We are not guides, but you might want to accompany us on a hike to a secluded spot far from the crowds. Return home after seeing the wonderful sights, shower, and relax while you prepare a supper in our chef's kitchen. We have a few favorite restaurants that we suggest if you choose to dine out. If you desire, a sumptuous dinner can be prepared for sharing. The costs for this, a second meal, would be discussed upon arrival.

Our experience as restauranteurs allows you a delectable time away from the rat race. When people ask us, “Where is the best meal in town?,” the response has always been, “158 Roaring Fork Road, when we are there.” As in any resort town, eateries are loud, expensive and rarely culinary gems. Don’t forget the wait in line. Dine at our table… comfortably.

Affordable prices for an experience of this caliber would be determined on an individual basis. Contact us for a further discussion of your EXACT needs.

Other things to note
We keep a list of our favorite hikes in your nightstand drawer. It is best to eat a hearty breakfast, get an early start, take plenty of food and water, and be respectful of bears. If you head for a waterfall, remember they are chilly places - even in the summer. A slow but steady pace is good. Count on 1 to 1.5 miles per hour. The land is not flat around here. Trust us, 4 miles one way here is not equal to four laps around the Mall. Take breaks often. There is always something beautiful to observe.

We love the mountain. However, not all guests share our enthusiasm. If you are coming to the Gatlinburg area to avail yourselves of the attractions, rest assured there is not enough time to see them all in one trip. We can help you arrive at some hidden gems.

listing_name: Gatlinburg Log Cabin with Mountain Views, Pool tab
description:
This Gatlinburg Mansion has incredible views, great location, swimming pool access, a sauna, & multiple games for entertainment! Your family or group will have a truly unique, fun, luxury experience at the 'Ritz!

The space
Welcome to Redneck Ritz, the luxury mountain cabin located in the heart of Gatlinburg, Tennessee! This lodge is loaded with deck space, multiple lounge areas, oversized hot tub, multiple arcade games, billiards, king bedroom suites, awesome views, and so much more! It is located just 3 miles from Downtown Gatlinburg and 5 miles from the Great Smoky Mountain National Park. This magnificent Gatlinburg mansion offers jaw-dropping views of the Smoky Mountains, a prime location, and a resort-style amenity package that will delight the entire family.

The main level of the cabin features a wraparound deck that offers breathtaking 360-degree views of the mountains, and a cozy living room with vaulted ceilings, leather furniture, and a seasonal fireplace! The loft area is equipped with its own TV, loveseat, bathroom, and premium king bed, all overlooking the stunning mountain vistas.

Step into this million-dollar lodge and be mesmerized by the authentic Whiskey Barrel 3000 Game package, featuring 2-player control and a video arcade games, perfect for hours of entertainment. The cabin has a spacious and luxurious interior, with 7 king-size beds, a covered hot tub, big screen TVs, pool table, air hockey, and Foosball, ensuring that there is something for everyone to enjoy!

The fully stocked kitchen on the main level features granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, and a dining room with a solid oak dining table, perfect for enjoying family meals. The next level down highlights a commercial 7' air hockey table, a pub table with chairs, a living area with TV, and an outdoor deck with a covered hot tub. This level also features two king bedrooms, each with its own unique décor. And a dry sauna for relaxing at the end of the day.

On the final level, you'll find your own dry oak tavern bar set up to socialize with your favorite cocktail or beverage, along with a professional slate pool table and foosball table for friendly competitions. There are two additional bedrooms on this level, along with more bathrooms and laundry facilities for your convenience.

Redneck Ritz also prioritizes your safety with a state-of-the-art surveillance and security system. The cabin is meticulously designed and built, offering premium luxury and comfort for families and friends to create unforgettable mountain memories!

Reserve Redneck Ritz today and experience the ultimate Smoky Mountain vacation! Please note that the minimum age requirement for renting is 25 years old, and smoking, house parties, events, and trailers are strictly prohibited. Book now and indulge in the luxurious Redneck Ritz for your next Gatlinburg getaway! Call now to make your reservation.

listing_name: Billiards, hot tub - 2 minutes from ski resort !
description:
We are vacation ready for you !

Come stay at an authentic log home on Ski Mountain in the exclusive Chalet Village in Gatlinburg. This is a built-from-scratch log home, not a standard home 'converted' to a log home. Interior construction features exposed log timbers and cedar walls.

The home features a magnificent and unique floor plan. The living area is anchored by a huge stone fireplace. On the porch is a soothing 4 person hot tub and firepit and upstairs is a regulation billiards table.

The space
Our rates are lower than last year ..... no inflation here !

The space overhead reveals a cathedral ceiling with exposed log timbers. The furniture is updated and exhibits a mountain theme. The sofa converts to a bed providing total sleep accommodations for 8. A 46' LCD widescreen TV is provided in the living area. A staircase winds behind the fireplace leading to a loft overlooking the living area. The loft contains a regulation billiards table.

The master bedroom is also located on the 2nd floor and features a sitting area and a large jetted Jacuzzi oversized tub. Ample windows afford a winter view of the Ski Mountain valley and distant peaks. The master bedroom also contains a large 46' LED TV

Two spacious guest bedrooms are located on the first floor with queen size beds. A guest bedroom with a jetted jacuzzi tub serves these bedrooms All bedrooms contain cable flat screen TV's. The kitchen contains all stainless major appliances, newer cabinets and is equipped with all cooking and eating utensils, dishwasher, stove and oven. You will enjoy lots of room sitting at our 6 person large rustic dining table.

Outside is a spectacular covered porch with a view across Ski Mountain. The porch has rocking chairs for great lounging and socializing. A gas grill is provided. A 4 person hot tub is located on the porch. Next to the home is a sun deck with full patio furniture, a firepit and seating areas.

This is an amazing home with an incredible layout. Come relax and have a great vacation or weekend getaway !

Guest access
The entire home is yours to enjoy

Other things to note
Please note there are 18 steps from the parking area up to the porch and entry door

The home is 1,800 square feet

Two Spacious Levels in this beautiful cabin. About 1500 SQ. Two full bathrooms. The main level has the living area, the kitchen, the master bedroom and a full bathroom. The living rooms has a 50 inch smart TV.
The lower level is an open floor plan family room/game room. There is a pool table, air hockey, arcade, 65 inch smart TV, sofa bed and bunk beds and a full bathroom.
Both levels have a large deck. The lower level deck has a hot tub.
The kitchen is stocked with pretty much everything you will need to prepare and serve meals. There is a dining table with six chairs.

Inside a beautiful cabin resort community just a few minutes outside of downtown Gatlinburg

Guest access
I am so excited to welcome you to our cabin - 836 Great Smoky Way, Gatlinburg TN 37738. The cabin will be ready for check in at 3pm.

The easiest way to find the cabin is to use GPS. If you do not have GPS - please let me know and I can provide you with written directions.

You must do the check in process on the Airbnb app the morning of you check in date. This gives you the address and door code as well as other important information. You may want to screen shot this info.
To access the front door - go directly to the cabin (you do not need to stop at the resort desk). When you get to the front door - you will see a keypad. Press the keypad to activate the lock. If you need to access the internet - the wireless network is called \Relaxation ” If you cannot connect for any reason - you should see several other wireless networks which do not require a key and you can connect to any of them.

If you have any questions - please do not hesitate to email or call me anytime.

Brenda Bark(PHONE NUMBER HIDDEN).

There is no requirement to take out trash. If you need to take trash out before you check out you can take it down to the dumpster which is just at the exit of Gatlinburg Falls resort.

There is no requirement to strip the beds but if you decide to strip the bed you can just pile the sheets and linens in one area before you leave.

The kitchen is fully stocked with pots and pans and dishes. There are linens for the beds and towels and washcloths available as well."

The space
🏔️ Bella Vista Lodge | Stunning Mountain & City Views | Hot Tub | Downtown Gatlinburg

Welcome to Bella Vista Lodge, your luxury mountain retreat in Gatlinburg, TN! Perched high above the city yet only 1 mile from downtown Gatlinburg, this spacious 4-bedroom, 4-bath cabin offers breathtaking panoramic views of the Great Smoky Mountains and sparkling city lights below. Watch sunsets over the peaks and enjoy the glow of the Gatlinburg Space Needle right from one of four private decks.

“Bella Vista” means Beautiful View — and it lives up to its name! With a rare flat yard, a cozy fire pit 🔥, and plenty of outdoor space, it’s perfect for families, couples, or groups looking for privacy, comfort, and proximity to everything Gatlinburg has to offer.

✨ Why Bella Vista Lodge Stands Out

✦ Owner Managed by Chris & Sarah: Personal care, quick communication, and meticulous upkeep — not a big rental company.
✦ Prime Location: Just minutes to Anakeesta, Ripley’s Aquarium, and the main Parkway; less than 2 miles to the National Park entrance.
✦ Panoramic Views: Watch the city lights and mountains from 4 expansive decks.
✦ Rare Flat Lot: Spacious, level yard — great for kids, games, or simply relaxing.
✦ Daily Bear Sightings 🐻: A favorite highlight for many guests!
✦ Luxurious Comfort: 4 king bedrooms (each w/private bath), 2 sofa beds + 2 roll-out beds — sleeps up to 14 guests.

✦ Game Room 🎮: Air hockey, shuffleboard, and a video arcade system.
✦ Modern Amenities: Fast Wi-Fi, 6 flat-screen TVs, 2 gas fireplaces, and a fully stocked kitchen.
✦ Pet Friendly 🐾: Dogs welcome with a fee — kennel provided.
✦ Holiday Décor: Beautifully decorated for Christmas, mid-Nov through mid-Jan.
✦ Ample Parking 🚗: Level driveway fits 6–8 vehicles.

Sleeps up to 14 Guests

✦ 2 Roll-Out Twin Beds


Main Level

Lower Level

Bella Vista sits on nearly 1 acre of flat, usable land — incredibly rare for a downtown Gatlinburg property. Most mountain cabins are perched on steep inclines, but here you’ll enjoy easy access, level parking, and outdoor space that’s perfect for kids and pets.

You’re just:

Up to two dogs welcome ($250 non-refundable fee). Please crate pets when unsupervised — a 36×24×24 kennel is provided.

🔒 Security Notice

Outdoor surveillance covers the parking area, yards, porches, and entryways only (no indoor surveillance). Footage is used solely for guest safety and property protection. By renting our property you understand and agree to our use of exterior surveillance cameras.

listing_name: Everyone Welcome! Private WiFi, Heated Pool.
description:
Mountain Dewey's borders the Great Smoky Mountain National Park and is close to the arts & crafts community, theme parks, aquarium & museums, shopping, water sports, nature, hiking, dinner shows, and more.

Our quiet and peaceful condo is on a mountaintop, which is not in town, but near town. Cozy and comfortable, we welcome visitors from all walks of life and backgrounds. Minutes from Gatlinburg, Pigeon Forge, and the wilderness, there are no limits of places to go and things to see.

The space
Begin your mornings with a cup of hot coffee on our second-floor balcony with a breathtaking vista that overlooks the town of Pigeon Forge, about 6 miles down the mountain. The same view sparkles after dark with the lights from hundreds of shops, restaurants, and fun places to play. My pictures from our balcony are all taken roughly from the same angle at different times of day, and all seasons of the year.

Many of our guests comment on how nice it is to have a quiet place to relax after all of the bustling activities in Gatlinburg & Pigeon Forge, or a beautiful hike on one of the myriad trails in the Smokies. Theme parks, horseback riding, swimming, biking, water sports, shopping, skiing, and zip-lining are great fun, all of which let you appreciate a good night's sleep! We offer three beds, one queen and two twin/singles. A fifth person could sleep on the sofa if they're not a giant, and there’s also a twin-size inflatable air mattress with an electric pump. Plenty of extra quilts, blankets, and throws are provided. I personally like to wrap up in a quilt when sitting on the balcony.

While the kitchen is compact, it is equipped well enough for the finest cook to serve a gourmet meal. In addition to the ordinary necessities, we have two coffee makers - a full-sized pot and a single-serve Keurig, an electric hand-mixer, a slow-cooker, blender, toaster, & microwave, and plenty of dishes, glasses, & silverware. There are wire whisks, corkscrews, can openers, cutting boards, and sharp knives. The refrigerator has an ice-maker. The stove and dishwasher are apartment-sized due to limited space. We also have a set of child-size dishes and silverware for smaller hands. They are dishwasher and microwave safe, so use them with abandon.

listing_name: Gatlinburg Rising!  Luxurious 2Bed/2Bath Cabin
description:
In the heart of the great American escape of Eastern Tennessee, you'll find yourself situated in a beautiful centrally located cabin in the relaxing city of Gatlingburg! Slip into your hot tub overlooking magnificent views of Mount Leconte. Relax in your very own heart-shaped Jacuzzi tub. Less than 5 minutes from the boutique shopping of downtown Gatlinburg and the Arts and Crafts loop. Take a hike in the Great Smoky Mountains National Park just around the corner.

The space
The cabin is located in the beautiful Gatlinburg Falls Resort community. Enter the front door to the spacious, modern, and well stocked kitchen equipped with all the same conveniences you enjoy at home. The dining table has seating for six. Adjacent to the dining area is the living room with a large screen TV and DVD player and an electric fireplace (does not produce heat) for that nice welcoming ambiance to enjoy anytime of the year but especially those chilly nights in the fall and winter when you're feeling the need to be cozy. Either of the bedrooms can be considered your master suite and both have flat screen TVs. The first floor bedroom has a king-sized bed with an adjacent bath with tub shower. Just upstairs you'll experience the cathedral ceilings, home of the all important game room! At the center of the room is a gorgeous pool table. To one side is the air hockey table and the arcade game which includes the 80's era video games Ms. Pac-man, Donkey Kong, Galaga, and Frogger! On the opposite side of the room is the bunk bed, great for children. Next to the beds is a high table with bar height chairs great for relaxing with a game on the flat screen wall mounted TV. Just off the game room is the other spacious bedroom with king-sized bed and adjoining full bathroom with shower stall and heart-shaped Jacuzzi. The upstairs bedroom has views of beautiful Mt. Leconte. In the back of the cabin both the first and second floors have decks with chairs and a small table, a wooden swing, and both with views of the trees and vegetation. The hot tub is located on the first floor deck just outside from the living room where there are views towards the front of the cabin towards Mt. Leconte. The cabin has 3 level and nicely paved parking spaces of its own.

Guest access
You will have access to the cabin with a secure code that will be given to you shortly before your arrival. There is no need for a key and no need to check in at a resort common area. Arrive anytime of the day. You will always be welcomed by the front porch lights which automatically go on every evening.

listing_name: Amazing Views | Theater | Hot Tub | Game Room
description:
It's Almost Heaven atop Elk Springs Resort looking at unrestricted views of Mt. LeConte and the Great Smoky Mountains. You can enjoy views of the mountains from all 3 levels in this cabin. Enjoy a movie in your own private theater room with leather reclining theater seats and a 9 foot theater screen. 4 Bedrooms, 3.5 Baths, 6 DVD Players, 2 Large Flat Screen TV's, Gas Grill and Sauna! Perfect for adults and kids.

The space
With a lower level game room area and upper level loft, there is plenty of room to spread out for peace and quiet (especially when bringing the kids).

Enter on the main level and admire the view of Mt. LeConte through the 25 foot wall of glass in the great room. You'll appreciate the exposed beams and woodwork in this new cabin, especially in the great room with comfortable seating for 6. The adjoining dining area with breakfast bar and full kitchen with cherry cabinetry includes upgraded stainless steel appliances and dishwasher as well as most of the cooking utensils, pots and pans you'll need. (coffee maker, mixer, blender, toaster, microwave, ice maker).

The romantic suite with king sized bed and high end mattress, full bath, stand up shower and heart shaped Jacuzzi tub to relax after a day of hiking. A washer/dryer and half bath finish out the main level.

Upstairs is a loft sleeping and sitting area with queen sofa sleeper and great views of the mountains. The second suite with king sized bed, rain shower Jacuzzi tub and custom window for a panoramic view of the mountains as well as the kids bunk room are down the hall from the loft area. The kids bunk room features queen over queen bunk beds that can easily sleep adults.

Play Time! The lower level features a pool table, air hockey table, sauna, theater room with 9 foot screen, HD project and surround sound. Did we mention the full wet bar? Outside on the deck is the hot tub with great views of the mountains.

This cabin includes FREE wireless internet!

listing_name: Creeksong: Creekside, Fire Pit, Outdoor Living
description:
Gather outside on the porch swing right beside the sounds of Webbs Creek and enjoy over 300 feet of creekside frontage. This 4 bedroom 4 bath luxury cabin features an outdoor fireplace, screened in porch and covered deck just a few feet from the creek.

The space
Relax, Recharge, Remember and visit with friends and family as you gather at Creeksong! A luxury 4 bedroom 4 bath Gatlinburg Cabin hand decorated with many personal touches reflecting the cabin owners love and appreciation for the flora and fauna of the great smoky mountains.

Dip your feet in the water, cast a line or simply sit in the porch swing and listen to the relaxing sound of Webbs Creek as it rushes by over 300 feet of water frontage. Want to have an outdoor wedding? There is plenty of space to celebrate with the creek sounds and sights in the background.

Finishing off the exterior is a wrap around deck with screened in breakfast porch on one side and covered outdoor wood-burning fireplace on the other. Enter into the great room with 28 foot floor to vaulted ceiling windows with plenty of seating for 7-8 adults. A large kitchen with dishwasher microwave, blender, coffee maker, toaster, mixer are included as well as pots and pans, mixing bowls and cookie sheets. For your convenience a side by side washer/dryer is provided in the separate utility room.

While not fully ADA compliant, this cabin is wheelchair accessible with 3 suites on the entry level with easy to access rest rooms with hand railings and stand-up shower in the lower level suite. Enjoy a great nights sleep after a day of hiking on the newly upgraded and high end mattresses.

A small children's play area with toys, a pool table and hot tub are also included for your entertainment. 3 TV's and 3 DVD players total for your entertainment.

We bet you can't find all of the over 140 bears that are playfully and creatively blended into the decor of this cabin.

listing_name: Moonshiners Legacy
description:
Waking up to the views of Mt. LeConte and fresh mountain it get much better? You can enjoy the views from the great room or from the loft with it wall of glass and intricate beam-work... or perhaps you'd rather enjoy them from the 101 degree hot tub on your covered deck. What a great way to recharge on your deserve it!

The space
This newer cabin features 2 stories with 2 king suites. Add the sleeper sofa and Moonshiner's Legacy sleeps a total of 6 guests. A fully stocked kitchen, washer/dryer, free WIFI and many other upgrades will easily add to your great vacation. You can relax in the great room, shoot a game of pool, play some darts or simply enjoy the views on one of the 2 decks.

Want to head into Gatlinburg? Moonshiner's Legacy is just a quick 8 minute drive and there is never any traffic when heading into Gatlinburg due it's location off highway 321. Given the heavy traffic, convenience does matter!

description:
Many visitors want to be close to the action in downtown Gatlinburg and don't necessarily want to spend as much or need all that a cabin has to offer. But that doesn't mean you need to stay in a hotel room and lose out on all the benefits of a vacation rental. At Gatehouse 106 you will have a fireplace, terrace, large sitting area, full kitchen to prepare in condo meals and access to a seasonal outdoor pool.

The space
More importantly, Gatehouse is the most recently developed condo building that is walking distance to downtown. It's a newer building that is private, well maintained and quiet. so you have all the conveniences of being in Gatlinburg in a newer unit at cabin value pricing!

You will enjoy a gas fireplace, upgraded kitchen, seating for 4 in the great room and 2 private king suites with 2 full baths and upgraded bedding. Perhaps you want to relax on the stream-side terrace or maybe use the outdoor seasonal pool.

Washer/dryer and cable TV is included for your convenience. FREE WIFI

** It is .6 mile walk to stoplight #3 downtown.

listing_name: Gorgeous Views, Creekside, Walk to Town
description:
Enjoy a spacious 2 bedroom newer condo with large balcony overlooking the creek below. Access to the seasonal pool is just steps away from your door. Easy access, close to downtown, flat parking.

The space
Located just 100 feet to the nearest Trolley Stop. The condo is about 3/4's of a mile to downtown - many guests easily walk to the strip. Seasonal outdoor pool open Memorial Day to Labor Day.

Lets face it, most of the condos in Gatlinburg are older and not in that great of shape. If you are looking for a Luxury condo and don't really want to spend as much as a cabin then Gatehouse condo 704 is perfect for your vacation.

A place where you can relax and be just minutes from the action downtown or in the National Park. Located walking distance to downtown this unit features plenty of spots to stretch out and relax depending on your mood. Perhaps you can read a book on the leather sofa in front of the gas fireplace or you can sit out on the terrace and admire the sights and sounds of the creek below.

With 2 king suites, each with their own bath, your condo has the perfect layout for 2 couples, a family with kids -and- it's even cost effective and cozy enough for just a couple getting away on a romantic mini-cation.

The cabin includes Cable TV, Free wireless internet and a washer / dryer for your convenience.

** The condo is .6 miles to stoplight #3 in Gatlinburg.

listing_name: Knotty Pine  - A Perfect Vacation Retreat
description:
Knotty Pine is a beautiful cabin located in the arts and crafts district of Gatlinburg. This 1 bedroom, 1.5 bath, log cabin home has a home sweet home feel. Unwind in the living room which features a gas fireplace, large television or relax on the two decks. While on the decks, you can enjoy mountain views from the hot tub or rocking chairs. The master suite is furnished with a beautiful custom log bed and definitely provide guest with a cabin feel they desire.

The space
Knotty Pine has been designed with our guests comfort in mind. The kitchen is equipped to prepare family meals or a quick morning coffee before heading out to explore the mountains. (Keurig and filter coffee machine).

The living room has a large television, comfortable furniture and a gas fireplace.
Off the living area is a beautiful deck with rocking chairs and a dining table. Whether you enjoy outside space or lounging on the couch, this home has a place for you.

The primary suite is on the lower level. The beautiful custom log king size bed, washer/dryer and ensuite bath is sure to provide you with all the comforts of home. Off the primary suite is another deck which has a hot tub and more rocking chairs.

There is a seasonal outdoor community pool as well as a play ground for your enjoyment.

Guest access
Guest have access to the entire property including pool, and playground.

Other things to note
This cabin is located in the heart of the arts and crafts district of Gatlinburg. There are a lot of local restaurants and shopping in the area, but you will be only a few minutes from the downtown Gatlinburg strip.

listing_name: Smoky Bear Hideaway
description:
Four Bedroom 2 Bath with year round hot tub and seasonal pool access to Chalet Village Pools

The space
Comfortable, clean Gatlinburg Chalet convenient to all the Smoky Mountain Fun
This cozy,  A-frame chalet in Chalet Village is approximately 2 miles from the Parkway in downtown Gatlinburg.  It is made even better with free wi-fi, a river rock gas fireplace, wood floors, 48-inch TV, cable and DVD player, and even a private deck with hot tub. This is a secluded Gatlinburg mountain getaway with comfort and charm.  This Gatlinburg Chalet has two bedrooms and one bath on each level, so there's plenty of room for everyone. Equipped with 1 king bed, 2 queen beds, and 1 full bed, everyone in your family or group can be under one roof and still have his or her own space. The upper level has a foosball table and mini pac man arcade game to help keep the little ones busy. A charcoal grill and picnic table are available for outdoor dining for nights in at your Gatlinburg cabin retreat. Smoky Bear Hideaway also offers full access to all three owners club locations during the summer months.

More about this Gatlinburg Chalet
This is a self-catering Gatlinburg vacation rental. We supply the chalet for your arrival with bed and bath linen, hand and bath soap, coffee, decaf, paper towels, bath tissue, dish soap, and dishwasher soap, and trash bags. Upon request, we will replenish supplies one time on a three to four-night stay, or two times on a five to seven-night stay at no charge

Smoky Bear Hideaway is convenient to Ober Gatlinburg, as well as all the fun downtown Gatlinburg and the Great Smoky Mountains National Park have to offer. The music theaters and shopping of Pigeon Forge and Sevierville, Dollywood and Splash Country, as well as the Arts and Crafts Community, which are just a short drive away.

From Memorial Day Weekend to Labor Day Weekend, you can access three Chalet Village Owners' Clubs with outdoor heated pools, playground, tennis, basketball, shuffleboard, pool table, and more.

listing_name: The Lodge at Ski Mountain
description:
Within minutes to several Great Smoky Mountain Park trailheads and Ober Mountain, The Lodge is perfect for outdoor enthusiasts and skiers. Tucked away in Chalet Village, The Lodge is close to the city center, Ober Gatlinburg and all the Gatlinburg attractions, while still providing that secluded, cabin experience.

The indoor space is spotless, and the outdoor space provides a private place to relax with a hot tub, wood-burning grill, and built-in seating for enjoying the fresh, mountain air.

The space
The Lodge at Ski Mountain is a historic A-frame cabin set in the middle of Chalet Village. As part of one of the original cabin communities built in the Gatlinburg area, The Lodge provides a rustic feel with modern, updated decor and appliances and convenient access to the Great Smoky Mountain National Park.

Whether it's a weekend away with the family, or a romantic couple's weekend, you'll love the massive stacked stone fireplace. The home has hardwood floors and original tongue and groove walls. The kitchen has been updated with stainless steel appliances and a convection oven.

Retreat to one of the two bedrooms after a day of fun in the city or a long hike in the mountains. The master bedroom downstairs includes a Queen Bed with scenic outdoor views. The upstairs loft includes a Full Bed with an en-suite half bath.

The outdoor space is the best part of The Lodge. With a large, private deck, The Lodge includes a hot tub, a perfect way to relax after long days in the Great Smoky Mountain National Park. Also boasting a wood-burning grill and built-in seating, The Lodge is a great place to grill up some dinner or make smores while enjoying the scenic, wooded views.

Other things to love about The Lodge:

-Primary, paved road with regular salting in winter.
-Large driveway with parking for 2 vehicles.
-High-speed wireless internet.
-Access to Chalet Village Clubhouses (pool, tennis courts, game rooms)
-Chalet Village Discount Card (Get discounts on some of Gatlinburg's most popular attractions!)

Guest access
Guests will have the entire cabin to themselves, with the exception of a locked owner's closet.

Other things to note

Guests to provide their own firewood for fireplace and wood-burning grill.

description:
Spring escape in the Smokies! This cozy cabin is just 10 minutes from Gatlinburg and 3 minutes from Rocky Top Sports World. Soak in mountain views from the private hot tub, enjoy the fireplace, and relax with a movie on the big-screen TV. Spend your days hiking Great Smoky Mountains trails, chasing waterfalls, exploring Anakeesta, Ober Mountain, and downtown Gatlinburg — your perfect Smoky Mountain cabin for a couples getaway or adventure weekend!

Brand-new couches added in October!

The space
🏔️What Guests Are Saying

“We had a wonderful stay at this cabin in Gatlinburg! The cabin was clean, cozy, and exactly as described. It had everything we needed for a relaxing getaway — a well-furnished kitchen, comfortable beds, and beautiful views from the deck. We especially enjoyed the peaceful, quiet location while still being close to downtown Gatlinburg and the national park. The host was very responsive and made the check-in process super easy. Enjoy the warmth of the gas fireplace or unwind in the hot tub after a day of adventure. For entertainment, the cabin boasts a full-size pool table, electronic darts, and smart TVs in every room.

The fully equipped kitchen is perfect for preparing meals, complete with modern appliances and essential cooking tools. Step outside to fire up the gas grill, ideal for outdoor cooking and enjoying meals on the deck with a view.

Whether you’re seeking a romantic retreat or a family vacation, Smokey’s Mountain View promises an unforgettable experience surrounded by nature’s beauty. Book your stay today!

listing_name: Tyrolea Lodge - Great Family Getaway Location
description:
Located in the Chalet Village Resort community of Gatlinburg, TN. Easy access to downtown Gatlinburg, The Great Smoky Mountains National Park, Pigeon Forge, and Dollywood. Parties and events are not allowed. Dogs are welcome.

The space
Tyrolea Lodge is a huge cabin suitable for the whole family. There are separate sleeping areas for multiple families or kids on opposite sides of the property.

There is a huge game room with a Pool Table, Foosball Table, Basketball, Card Table, Queen Sleeper Sofa and Chair, and 65\ Smart TV. There is a small (8x12 foot) balcony off on the game room with a table and chairs. You could use this as a smokers porch since smoking is not allowed inside the cabin.

Across the hall from the game room is the room we call the \"Boy's Dorm\"
listing_type: but it is suitable for anyone. It has Full bed
room_type:
and two queen sleeper sofas. The room also has lots of floor space for sleeping bags or air beds. There is a 40\" Smart TV in this room.

Next up the hall is the Laundry Room. It has a full size washer and dryer and lots of storage space.

Across the hall from the laundry is what we call the \"Girls Dorm\"
cover_photo_url:
but it is also suitable for anyone. It has a King Size Bed and a Queen size bed. This room also has a 40\" Smart TV. There is an en suite bathroom attached which has a toilet vanity and tiled shower.

Next down the hall is an extremely large bathroom. It has a toilet
photo_urls: and double vanity. There is a lot of empty space in this room which allows space for mobility challenged guests. This is not a handicapped accessible bathroom
host_id:
it just has a lot of room.

Down the hall and around the corner is the giant living room. This is the hub of the house where all traffic passes through from outside and the rest of the cabin. This room has high vaulted ceilings with exposed beams and hardwood floors. There is a two sided fireplace which is shared with the dining room. There is plenty of comfortable seating with a 2 kidney shaped couches and 2 recliners. There is a full wet bar in this room which can double as a serving buffet area for the dining room. This room has a 50\" Smart TV. The main entry door to the cabin comes into the living room. There are also two sets of French doors opening out into the sun room.

The dining room has seating for 16. This room is under the A-Frame portion of the cabin and has 25 foot high peak. There is a large dining table which will seat 10 (6 chairs and two benches which could seat even more younger guests). There is also a smaller breakfast table which will seat 4. There are stools provided so that 2 can sit at the granite bar facing the kitchen. There is a huge buffet which contains all of the dishes
cohost_ids:
and glassware. This unit also contains specialty and seasonal serving dishes. There are double French doors off the dining room which lead out to the large front deck. This deck also has a picnic table which can seat at least 4 persons (weather permitting).

The kitchen is open to the dining room and has all appliances including dishwasher. There is a very large refrigerator/freezer. There is a pantry with pull out shelves in the kitchen as well as another area down the hall which can also be used as a pantry.

Off the kitchen is a very comfortable King bedroom. There is a 40\" Smart TV in this bedroom.

Down the hall is a King bedroom. This bedroom also has a 40\" Smart TV.

There is a sauna across from this bedroom. This is a small sauna with two full size benches.

Across from the sauna is a bathroom which has a toilet
latitude:
and jetted Jacuzzi tub.

Upstairs from the dining room is the \"Loft Suite\". This is a huge area which has a Queen bed. There is a vanity and the en suite bathroom has a toilet and shower. There is a small reading/TV viewing area at the top of the stairs. The loft has a 40\" Smart TV which may be viewed from either the bed or the sitting area. Note: the loft suite is open to the dining room below. There are excellent views of the Smoky Mountains from here through the large A-Frame windows. The bed is very far back from the living room and can't be seen from below.

Through the living room French doors is a huge screened in sun porch which has a dining table which seats 6 and a wicker pit group and bar table. Outside the screen is a deck with a large 8 person hot tub overlooking the wooded slopes below. There is a large gas grill off this deck. We provide the gas.

There is a large wrap around grass yard which provides lots of places for outdoor activities.

Off the driveway behind the rocks is a hidden patio with a gas fire pit and chairs. This a a great place in the evenings and also during the afternoons. Often

there is a wonderful breeze that comes up the slopes making this one of the best places to be on a summer afternoon.

The upstairs portion of the cabin is yours.

listing_name: Sweetheart of a studio - Southern Nights!
description:
Southern Nights is a studio cabin that is located only 1.2 miles from downtown Gatlinburg. Nothing but forest behind our cabin that goes all the way to the GSMNP! Relax in the outdoor hot tub on our private, covered back porch & look at the twinkling stars of the southern sky. Or, if it is too cold outside, retreat inside to the Jacuzzi and enjoy the ambiance of the 50” electric fireplace! We are very close to the action of Gatlinburg! Free WiFi, washer/dryer, charcoal grill.

The space
We are back! Construction completed in late 2017 after our cabin burnt in the wildfire of 2016.

Welcome to the all new Southern Nights! Since we are a studio, we are couples delight! We are fully equipped with a Smart TV and DirecTV stream for when you are ready to connect with the world. However, when you are ready to unplug from the world & enjoy that special someone's company - this is when you will really love those sweet Southern Nights! We have both an indoor jacuzzi and an outdoor hot tub to sit in and relax, as well as a king size bed with a memory foam mattress. Also, a 50” wall mounted electric fireplace for ambiance inside! We have a fully stocked kitchen and charcoal grill to enjoy cooking in and chilling out; however, we are really close to all the wonderful restaurants of Gatlinburg (& Pigeon Forge) should you decide to dine out! Come escape to our Southern Nights cabin and the Great Smoky Mountains and make memories that will last a lifetime!

The cabin is equipped with a keyless entry system, so you can arrive directly at the cabin with no need to pickup or drop off keys at another location. Like us on social media for specials and area information!

*If you are traveling with another couple or a group, we have a couple of almost identical cabins located very close by (Lover’s Escape, Smoky Mountain Rain, Beartastic Memories, Sunset Vista and Honeymoon Magic). They are also listed on Airbnb.

Guest access
Entire cabin except for the storage closet above the bathroom (the hot water heater is up there) and yard Driveway is paved and uphill for about 100’ but level at the top at the right side of the cabin for the graveled parking.

Other things to note
Our Business Tax License # is 8657

** there is not a landline phone here!

We are a studio cabin. The bedroom is in the main cabin not a separate room. We are perfect for honeymooners or couples looking for an intimate getaway! or small families (three maximum with a smaller child due to sleeping arrangements) for quality family time together...

Beds/Baths: One King Bed in the main room, One bathroom with tub and shower. Jacuzzi in main room as well.

We are decorated for Fall and Christmas!

*** No check in or out on Thanksgiving or Christmas Eve or Day! Easter Sunday may be later than 4 pm

Due to sometimes inclement weather in the winter, we recommend travel insurance, which Airbnb has a link for buying.

REPAIRS & SERVICE CALLS: We take pride in maintaining our cabin & perform regular maintenance to keep everything in good working order. It is impossible, however, to guarantee that all appliances, hot tub, fireplaces, etc., will be in working order 100% of the time. We will, however, make every effort to correct any problem you encounter during your stay as soon as possible. Non-emergency maintenance issues will be handled during normal business hours. If you need emergency maintenance, please contact us at the cell phone number provided in your confirmation. While we will attempt to correct all issues as quickly as possible, no refunds will be made for mechanical failures of hot tub, appliances/electronics, or interruption/loss of utilities (including satellite TV), etc. Authorized repairmen have the right to enter the property to accomplish needed repairs even if the service call was made prior to your arrival. Thanks in advance for your understanding.l

listing_name: Homey 3 bedroom close to Rocky Top. Inviting hot t
description:
NEWLY remodeled!
Bear Alley is our beautiful two story cabin located in the heart of Gatlinburg Tennessee. Close to all the main attractions of Gatlinburg and the Great Smoky Mountains National park. Our cozy cabin has a warm inviting fireplace in the living room. You will have a great time playing pool and games upstairs in our game room and enjoy the hot tub on the back deck. Charcoal grill and fire pit too. TV'S in bedrooms and living room. A great place for a family reunion or friends.

The space
The large deck tucked behind the cabin is perfect for that refreshing spot to rest and relax. Either in the rocking chairs on the comfortable furniture or the hot tub, you will find the experience relaxing. The tree-Lined yard comes equipped with rockers, charcoal grill, and outdoor fire pit.
Gather In the, warm and welcoming living room to share stories of the day. You are sure to find it very comfortable to kick back and play games or watch your favorite TV programs on the flat screen TV. The fireplace makes this room very cozy in the winter months. The full length windows allow natural light and sweeping views of the beautiful outdoors. With a wood log sofa and two chairs, this is the place to relax.
Free WIFI is available throughout the cabin so you can keep abreast of all the latest news or to check your email. That is, if you really want to!
Settle into the queen size bed in the upstairs master bedroom when you are ready for a good nights sleep or just to snuggle up with that special someone. This bedroom features a huge walk around closet along with the iron and ironing board.
Also on the second floor is the pool table, a gaming system with multiple games such as Pac man, Tetris and others.
Located in this room is a comfortable futon that lays down to become a queen size sleeper and a set of twin bunk beds.
The bedrooms on the main level features one queen size beds with a shared bathroom. The other bedroom has a king bed with an attached private bathroom. All bedrooms feature flat screen cable TV's as well.
The wash closet features a full size washer and dryer so you will never need to worry about having clean clothes.
The bathrooms, three in all, features a full size shower/tub with plenty of hot water to relax those tired muscles from your daily hikes. The master bathroom also features a jetted tub to soak away the cares of the day.
The kitchen is fully equipped with all the expected amenities including a drip coffee maker and French press.
A starter pack of toilet paper, paper towels, dish soap and dishwashing tabs and trash bags are included with your stay.
No keys to lose or to return! Our cabin provides secure, keyless entry with an smart Lock. You can lock and unlock the door with your unique personal entry code issued to you for the duration of your stay. When you reserve our place, directions will be emailed to you.

It’s important to clarify that our property is a private mountain cabin, not a hotel. This means that while we do our absolute best to ensure cleanliness, maintenance, and comfort, there are some realities of cabin life such as the presence of occasional insects or minor wear and tear from constant guest turnover that are part of the experience when staying in a wooded, natural environment.

We strive to give you the BEST experience possible and hope that you will give us a 5 star review at the end of your stay. As this is how we make our living, we count on your 5 star review to help us thrive. If you don't feel like we have earned a 5 star review, PLEASE contact me personally so that I may try to fix whatever is wrong and earn a 5 star. Thanks for looking at our home in the mountains. We hope that you will enjoy your stay.

Guest access
You and your family will have complete use of the cabin.

Other things to note
Fall special going on now for last minute bookings!

LOCATION: Keep in mind that you are driving up to 3,000 feet above elevation. In this area, you can be in the main drag of tourist attractions and get an amazing view. (even to go hiking to various locations, is a little bit of a drive. You are in the mountains.) You can relax up in the mountain at the condo or enjoy hiking, snow skiing, mountain coasters, dinner shows, white water rafting, golf and more. Enjoy relaxing watching the sunset off the deck. .

When your at the complex, you will see an abundance of wildlife in the area. It is common to see wild turkey, deer, bunny rabbits and yes, black bear roaming the grounds below. It is a nature location with prime view and relaxation. Absolutely don't feed the wild life as it is not just our rule but a Tennessee guideline.

Drive up the mountain to the condo is a really cool experience and can be culture shocking to some. The roads are slight curvy as you are driving up a mountain. If you are not used to driving the mountain roads, it can an interesting experience as it was for us when we first drove up there. It is one of the better mountain roads in the area to drive. The drive up the mountain has some beautiful views of the Great Smokey Mountains and overlooking the town of Gatlinburg. As always, drive with caution no matter where you are.

Our condo is good for couples, solo adventurers, business travelers, and families (with kids). This condo is approximately 804 square feet. You will have an amazing view of the mountains and minimal drive to various destinations such as snow skiing resorts, down town Gatlinburg, Pigeon Forge and Dollywood. (Our condo's view is of the mountains, not at the ski resort. You can see the ski resort as you approach the condo complex. (Summit)

There are some apps that allow you to watch free movies and channels. Roku even has a streaming channel to stream live tv. Roku does offer you to use your various apps such as Netflix, Peacock, HBO, etc. We will not be responsible if you pick the wrong day of check out on the roku app and someone else uses it. Please note, the Roku devices do freeze after they have been left on for awhile and have not been turn off . If this happens, simply unplug the device and plug it back it. There are also two remote chargers for the roku's. There is one in each bedroom. We are working on getting one for the living room.
