listing_name: Luxury, Location, Privacy, View, Firepit, Theater
description:
Knocking on Heaven’s Door – Luxury Gatlinburg Cabin with Firepit, Hot Tub & Mountain Views.

Luxury 4-bedroom Gatlinburg cabin with breathtaking mountain views, firepit, and 7-person hot tub. Enjoy a private game room, theater, three decks, and access to Chalet Village amenities—all just minutes from downtown Gatlinburg, Ober Gatlinburg, and Dollywood. Pet-free, spacious, and perfect for families or groups up to 10

The space
Please note: We maintain a pet-free environment for the comfort and consideration of all our guests. No exceptions are allowed.

No check-in/out on Thanksgiving, Christmas, or New Year’s Day

Escape to the Smoky Mountains in this private 4-bedroom, 3-bathroom luxury cabin, comfortably sleeping up to 10 guests. Nestled in Ski Mountain’s Chalet Village, the cabin offers breathtaking mountain views, a firepit, 7-person hot tub, game room, private theater, and three spacious decks—perfect for family fun, relaxation, and making unforgettable memories.

Highlights & Amenities:

Firepit for cozy evenings under the stars

Game room with custom pool table, 60-game arcade, pinball, Connect 4, card/poker table & cornhole

Theater with 65” Roku TV and streaming access to HBO Max and Paramount Plus

Wood-burning fireplace in the living room

Roku Smart TVs in all 4 bedrooms

Fully stocked kitchen with blender, toaster, slow cooker, pots & pans, wine glasses, Keurig, and drip coffee maker

AT&T 1GB fiber high-speed Internet

Access to Chalet Village Owners Club with pools, and tennis courts

Bedrooms:

Main Level King Master with shower

Two Upstairs King Bedrooms sharing a bath with tub/shower and top-deck access via catwalk

Lower Level Queen Master with two beds and Roku TV

Living Spaces:

Open-concept living area with wall of windows, wood-burning fireplace, deck rockers and outdoor dining

Dining area perfect for family meals and gatherings

Fully equipped kitchen ready for cooking and entertaining

Outdoor & Nearby Attractions:

Three decks and a level backyard, ideal for wildlife sightings including bears, and turkeys

Hot tub with panoramic mountain views

Firepit, charcoal grill and picnic table for relaxing evenings

Just 3 miles from downtown Gatlinburg, 4 miles from Ober Gatlinburg, and 9 miles from Dollywood

Gatlinburg Trolley Station nearby for car-free trips to shopping, dining, and hiking trails

Guest Experience:

Personal attention from cabin owners—this is not a management company property

Full access to all amenities and Chalet Village community clubs

Cabin provides all bedding, towels, basic toiletries, and starter supplies for a stress-free vacation

Whether enjoying a movie in the theater, challenging family and friends in the game room, soaking in the hot tub, or roasting marshmallows at the firepit, Knocking on Heaven’s Door offers the perfect balance of seclusion, comfort, and adventure in the heart of the Smoky Mountains.

Guest access
You’ll have the cabin to yourself.

Other things to note
THINGS TO KNOW

- We provide a fully stocked kitchen including Crock Pot, Keurig coffee maker and regular coffee maker.

- We provide all bedding/linens, bath towels, wash cloths and basic toiletries such as shampoo, conditioner, lotion.

- We provide a starter supply of toilet paper, paper towels, dish washing detergent and laundry detergent. (Enough to get your vacation started).

listing_name: Mountain Views, Golfing, Hot Tub, Game Rm
description:
Vacation rental in Gatlinburg. Authentic Log Cabin by the Bent Creek Golf course which scenic course with a challenging mountain-style layout with views of the Smokies and plenty of fairway and greens. This log Cabin is the perfect place to make new memories with friends and family. Its 15 mins to downtown, minutes to zip lining and river rafting. This cabin offers gorgeous Mtn Views, fireplace, BBQ, Game room and Hot Tub. Fully stock kitchen, linens and towels. Parking up to 5 cars.

The space
As you come in you are greeted with the spacious living area thats been thoughtfully designed for your group to relax and enjoy together. Sit and enjoy the fireplace and enjoy the views of the mountains.

The fully equipped kitchen with the top of the line appliances and most of the things you would need in a kitchen to make a tasty meal to gather around the dining table.

Each of the 4 bedrooms and loft have been thoughtfully furnished for a great night sleep. Quality linens, black out curtains and ample storage space. There are also brand new comfortable sofa beds one in the living room and one in the game room. To allow for a total of a 14 people stay.

Plus the proximity to golfing, zip lining, river rafting and a 15-min drive to downtown Gatlinburg is unbeatable opportunity.

After a fun day in downtown or Pigeon forge is great to come back and relax in our new hot tub.

While you plan your trip do not forget to add this listing to your wishlist favorite.

Guest access
Guest will have access to the entire home, and its amenities as community pool. Parking for upto 5 cars in driveway.

Other things to note
The cabin is well equipped with pot, pans, plates, cups, utensils, microwave, dishwasher, blender, slow cooker, insta pot, toaster, bakeware, electric griddle, washer, dryer, BBQ with propane gas, towels and bed linens. Guest are responsible to supply their own food and toiletries.

description:
Our Chalet is the perfect place for a romantic getaway and offers beautiful Smoky Mountain views! Located in highly desirable Chalet Village with access to all Chalet Village Swimming Pools and Amenities! Close to Town and the National Park!

The space
Our Chalet offers beautiful mountain views and and is located just minutes from Downtown Gatlinburg, Ober Mountain Resort, and the National Park. The entire Chalet is yours during your stay. Custom designed and built, one level, comfortable and convenient, our Chalet has a King-size bed, jacuzzi, hot tub, fireplace, kitchen, wi-fi, 2 HD flat-screen TVs (with Roku streaming).

The architecture, decor and layout is spacious, private and comfortable and convenient. Especially designed for couples to relax and renew. Magnificent mountain views! Close to Downtown Gatlinburg, The Great Smoky Mountains National Park, and Ober Mountain Resort!

We do not use cleaning crews that go to multiple properties. The fact that ours is a one-bedroom Chalet with only 2 adult guests per stay and stringent cleaning between guests will help to bring you a sense of comfort.

listing_name: Log Inn: spacious Gatlinburg cabin w/ 5BR/3bath
description:
*FREE ATTRACTIONS TICKETS FOR EACH DAY OF YOUR RESERVATION! Across from Smoky Mountains National Park & 3 miles from downtown Gatlinburg*20 mins from Dollywood* *Pet Friendly w/approval* 5 BR/3bath, Comfortably sleeps 15 *3 king beds, 1 double, 1 trundle(single pull out), 2 queen bunks, 2 sofa beds (1 pack 'n play)*A large living room *Game room*Hot tub*Full kitchen*Outside deck space w/grill

The space
FREE ATTRACTIONS TICKETS FOR EACH DAY OF YOUR RESERVATION: see below!
Nestled on a wooded hillside in a rustic resort just across the street from Great Smoky Mountains National Park, Log Inn offers all the rustic get-away charm of a cabin with modern comforts and amenities. With 3000 square feet of living area at your disposal, including five bedrooms, three bathrooms and a spacious, full-featured kitchen, hosting big families and other groups is a breeze. A large living room with a year round gas fireplace and lots of seating, accommodates plenty of people for those special times of togetherness, while the cabin's three-level design makes it easy for the whole group to spread out. Pet-friendly with a pet fee of $84.56 per pet for the stay. Pets are not allowed on the furniture.
Want to go out and explore? No problem! You'll be just minutes from Downtown Gatlinburg and Great Smoky Mountains National Park, and right next to the famous Arts and Crafts district of Gatlinburg. Pigeon Forge, local center of dining, shopping and entertainment, is within easy reach, a few miles drive down one of the most scenic sections of the Parkway.
But if you're looking to get away from it all, Log Inn has all the entertainment options you'll need. Without having to set foot out of the cabin, guests will have access to a plethora of activities. You can have a relaxing soak in the inviting hot tub. Enjoy the full-featured game room, including a large flat screen television equipped with cable and a PlayStation video game system. Shoot a few games of pool or enjoy our 2 player multicade arcade game. Want some private time away from the rest of the group? Each bedroom is equipped with its own flat screen TV. Wi-Fi is also available throughout the cabin, so social media and the internet are just a click away. For guests with limited mobility, there are 3 steps to get into the cabin. We have a recliner in the living room and the main floor has a king bedroom with a roomy full bath with a walk-in shower.
Park right next to the cabin, which can accommodate up to 4 cars(but no trailers) and walk up a few steps to the front door. The main entry has the living room on the right and the kitchen on the left, going through the kitchen you pass the laundry room and can access the master bathroom from the hall or the master bedroom which features a spacious bathroom and king bed. The main floor has two accesses to one of the two decks. The top deck has a gas grill, outdoor seating, and bear proof trash can.
From the main living room, you can go upstairs to get to 2 bedrooms and 1 bath. The bedroom on the top left has a double bed and a twin trundle, shared bathroom in the middle of the two rooms featuring a shower/tub combo. The upstairs bedroom on the right has a king bed and fold out futon.
From the main living room again, there is a open doorway to the basement stairs. The basement has a comfortable gaming/movie sectional, pool table, wet bar and sit down arcade game. The bedroom on the left has 2 queen bunk beds, bathroom in the middle of the two rooms has a shower/tub combo, identical to the 3rd floor bathroom. The room on the right has a King bed and access to the lower deck which has lots of rocking chairs and our hot tub.

Log Inn is located in rustic Mountain Shadows Resort and includes access to the resort's amenities. A playground and a swimming pool (open from Memorial Day to Labor Day) are conveniently located a couple of minutes' drive away. This cabin can only accommodate up to 4 cars, our overflow parking is is down the road at the public parking for the trolley. No trailers are allowed in the resort.
**Holiday Note**
We do not allow reservations that end or begin on Thanksgiving day or Christmas day.
Not only do you get all this, but we also give you a FREE ticket to an attraction with each day of your reservation! Here is a current list of the free tickets you can get--one free per attraction per day, subject to change, season and availability: Sky Ranch, Pirates dinner show, Comedy Barn, Adventure park or Legacy ziplines, Big Creek Expeditions whitewater rafting, Alcatraz Crime museum, Beyond the Lens family fun, Country Tonite Music Show, Dollywood Theme Park, Dollywood's Splash Country, Five Oaks riding stables, Paula Deens Lumberjack Adventure Park, dinner at Mama's Farmhouse, Rocky Top Mountain Coaster, Soaky Mountain Water Park, Rowdy Bear Snowpark, the Great Smoky Mountain Wheel at the Island,MagicQuest, TopJump Trampoline park and Wonderworks!

Guest access
The whole house is yours to use, with the exception of the attic space and crawlspace.

Other things to note
No trailers allowed in the resort at all.

description:

Perched above the historic Roaring Fork Stream and just 0.9 miles from downtown Gatlinburg, this charming 1BR/1BA cabin offers the ultimate blend of serenity and access. Sleeps 4 • Historic Cabin • Waterfront • Walk to Trolley • Rustic-Modern Charm

Originally built in 1930 and beautifully renovated, this cabin captures the magic of mountain living with every detail—from its rich wood tones to the sound of the stream below.

⸻

⸻

⸻

• Standard drip coffee maker (bring your favorite roast)

⸻

🌿 Outdoor Living
• Paver patio with private hot tub overlooking the river
• Charcoal grill (bring your own charcoal)
• Peaceful sitting area with unobstructed stream views

⸻

💡 Extras That Make It Easy
• High-speed WiFi
• Smart TVs (no cable—bring your streaming logins)
• Starter supplies: toilet paper, paper towels, dish soap

⸻

🎈 Whether you're sipping coffee to the sound of rushing water or walking into town for dinner, this cabin offers Smoky Mountain magic at every turn.

Guest access
Entire cabin

Other things to note
• Must be 21 or older to book this cabin.
• Maximum occupancy: 4 guests.
• Parking available for 1 vehicle.
• 4x4 vehicle recommended for exploring the greater Smoky Mountains region.
• Fireplace is gas and operates seasonally (Oct–Mar).
• Coffee maker is standard drip—please bring your own coffee.
• The Roaring Fork Stream is stocked weekly—fishing licenses can be purchased locally.
• Hot tub is drained, sanitized, and refilled between each guest stay. It may need time to reach full temperature on the check-in day.
• Starter supplies of toilet paper, paper towels, dish soap, and laundry detergent are provided.
• Guests agree to use the website messenger for all communication, even if initial contact is made by another method.
• Bears and all types of wildlife are very common in the area! Do not feed or bother the bears or wildlife! Please leave them alone. We have no control over wildlife. They are very protected here and part of our area. Secure your belongings and always lock vehicle doors.
• We have monthly pest control at all of our cabins.  Being in the Great Smoky Mountains, we are surrounded by nature and wildlife.  Ladybugs, millipedes, and other insects can be difficult to combat around this time of year, even with our constant pest control program in place.  It is not uncommon to see them occur in and around the cabin/condo, especially with the opening and closing of doors.  This is extremely common for the area and all cabins/condos.
• Being in the mountains, wind can sometimes blow leaves, dirt, or other natural debris into the hot tub. The hot tub has been drained and cleaned to ensure it’s ready for use.

3.What does the Kitchen include? - The Kitchen is stocked with everything you would expect in a normal kitchen including a toaster, various size pots & pans, wine glasses, coffee cups, and a regular coffee pot.
4. Do you allow pets? - No. Under no circumstances are pets allowed.
5. When will I get the address and condo access info? - Address, door code, and directions are messaged at least 2-5 days prior to your check in date.
6. What time is check-in and check-out? - You may check in anytime after 3 pm and you must check out prior to 11 AM on the day of your departure.
7. Are there any days where Check-in or Check-out is not permitted? - The only 2 days that we do not allow check-in or check-out are Thanksgiving Day, Christmas Day.

Other things to note
You will receive a door code and directions to the condo about 2-5 days prior to your check in date. Please pick up the parking pass from the condo when arriving and place on the dash of your car.

description:

The space
Away From Everyday is a private cabin with tree top views. It is a beautiful 2 bedroom 2 bath recently redone cabin. It has the charm of yesteryear and conveniences of today. Each bedroom has it's own full bath and is decorated in a different mountain theme. Mattress replaced June 2024. Also enjoy your own Roku enabled TV. The living area welcomes you sit a while and enjoy the gas fireplace, the comfy sofa and the two comfortable gliding chairs while enjoying your favorite TV shows or streaming your favorite movie with the 50 inch Roku enabled TV or soaking up the tranquil treetop views. A spacious fully equipped kitchen with stainless steel appliances and a large dining table with ample room for 4 complete the upstairs living space. The large top deck holds the very private hot tub, outdoor dining and seating for 4 and an electric grill to cook your favorite meal.
But wait! walk down the circular stairs into the game room or walk to the lower deck and enter the game room through the fully screened porch. That is where you will find the slot machine, darts, a classic 60 arcade game, a comfy couch to wait your turn, a large Roku tv and a electric wall mount fireplace Also on this lower level is the washer and dryer. Of course the porch has comfortable seating to enjoy those lazy days where all you want is a comfy chair and a good book.
Linen and towels are provided, including large hot tub towels.

We provide starter toliet paper and paper towels for your stay. We have a Keurig Coffee maker with complimentary K-cups and sugar. No need to bring basic spices as we provide them along with condiments and oil.

There are 2 locked closets. 1 In game room and 1 in the right side bedroom

THIS CABIN IS SEASONALLY DECORATED!

For those bringing your dogs - we are pet friendly for dogs only (max of 2), not cats or monkeys or birds, nothing else- just dogs. Also there is a nonrefundable pet fee to be paid. This fee covers bringing your dog with you and not any damage or additional cleaning. We do have a pet vac for your use.

ALL SIZES OF DOGS MUST BE PRE APPROVED (please send breed and weight)

NO SMOKING OF ANY KIND AND ANY SUBSTANCES IS ALLOWED IN OUR CABIN

All this and only minutes to downtown Gatlinburg, Pigeon Forge, Dollywood and
Sevierville. Make plans to bring the family and book Away From Everyday today.

listing_name: The Mason Jar Lodge
description:
The Mason Jar Lodge is a locally owned and custom built cabin that is located in the Great Smoky Mountains. The home is just minutes away from the heart of downtown Gatlinburg, the national park, Gatlinburg’s Arts & Crafts Community, top dining destinations, and much more. However, as you take in the beautiful vistas from the decks, relax in the hot tub, meander among the muscadines, or watch the black bears play, you’ll feel as if the hustle and bustle of the city is a thousand miles away.

The space
Mason Jar Lodge is by far one of the most charming cabins that you’ll find in the Smokies. The home is filled with rustic yet stylish decor and is extra cozy. The home includes all of the amenities that you need for a home away from home stay, and is greatly loved among past guests. Both decks offer stunning views of the mountains and on the bottom deck you’ll find a tucked away and secluded hot tub. The top deck is perfect for grilling out and relaxing after a long day of exploring the Gatlinburg. The full kitchen has everything you need to enjoy a meal in and the coffee bar is an excellent perk when you’re trying to get moving for the day. Large flat screen televisions and a great wifi connection will keep you entertained or connected to work or family and friends back home. Wood burning fireplaces add to the ambiance on cold winter nights and the lushness of the property adds beauty to the spring and summer months. The upstairs bedroom includes a king bed and laundry area that adds convenience to your stay. The master king suite is located on the lower level of the home and includes a sitting area, bar, wood burning fireplace, and is the perfect setting for the perfect getaway in the mountains. A stay at Mason Jar Lodge is perfect for anyone looking to escape the monotony of every life and relax in a beautiful place that surrounded with opportunities that include outdoor adventures, shopping, top rated dining locations, theme parks & attractions, cultural experiences, and much more.

Guest access
Guests have use of the entire lodge and property, including all amenities.

Other things to note
If you’re looking for first class accommodations, look no further.

Guest access
Entire Cabin

• Being in the mountains, wind can sometimes blow leaves, dirt, or other natural debris into the hot tub. The hot tub has been drained and cleaned to ensure it’s ready for use.

description:
Welcome to Heaven’s Gate 1 — a pet-friendly cabin perched at the top of Ski Mountain in Chalet Village! Perfect for couples or small families, this cozy retreat offers incredible Smoky Mountain views, a private hot tub, and the chance to spot bears and other wildlife. Relax on the back deck overlooking Gatlinburg, or explore nearby attractions — close to downtown and convenient to Pigeon Forge. Guests have access to clubhouse amenities including pool.
Must be 21+ to book. Pets allowed with fee.

The space
Our cabin is all on one level. A few steps lead to the entrance. Inside, you'll find an open living area with a kitchen (stocked with basic cooking tools), a dining table for four, and a cozy living room with a wood-burning fireplace (we don’t provide wood) and a TV. There’s also a half bath nearby.

The master bedroom has a jacuzzi tub, and the master bathroom has a stand-up shower.

Outside, the enclosed deck has a hot tub, rocking chairs, and a propane grill, perfect for enjoying the beautiful views.

*For additional guests, a pull-out couch is provided.*

Please Note: The drive to the cabin is on a paved road but can be narrow and has steep, curvy hills. The driveway entrance is also steep, so if you have a lowered car, you might find it challenging to get in and out. Parking is for one car only.

The property is Pet friendly and welcome with a pet fee.

As a family-owned business, we are dedicated to providing you with an enchanting getaway!

Guest access
Entire cabin.

Our cabin has a very steep driveway. During rare winter snow (usually January–February), a 4x4 vehicle is required to access the property safely. Please know that we are not able to guarantee snow removal, as our maintenance team does not have 4x4 access. If snow is forecast during your stay and travel becomes unsafe, we’re happy to work with you on a refund or reschedule.

Please note we are not able to guarantee driveway snow removal, as our maintenance team does not have 4x4 access. listing_name: Lover’s Escape - perfect for two!
description:
Welcome to Lover's Escape -
Located only 1.2 miles from downtown Gatlinburg. Nothing but forest behind our cabin that goes all the way to the GSMNP! Relax in the outdoor hot tub & look at the twinkling stars of the Smoky Mountain sky. Or, if it is too cold outside, retreat to the Jacuzzi inside. We are very close to the action of Gatlinburg & not too far from Pigeon Forge either! Fiber WiFi, Smart HD TV, washer/dryer, charcoal grill.

The space
We are back! Rebuild construction completed in late 2017 after the cabin burnt in 2016 wildfire...

Designed specifically for couples, we welcome you to escape from normal life to a vacation home tucked away in the Roaring Fork section of Gatlinburg in Forest Springs. We are slightly over a mile to downtown Gatlinburg, yet enough in the woods that bears sometimes walk by...Smart access to TV is available when you want to be plugged in to the world, but when you turn the TV off is when you will really enjoy our cabin. A king sized bed crafted from reclaimed lumber with a new memory foam mattress invites you to sleep in and relax. listing_name: Couple’s Mtn Getaway;Great Mtn Views;2 Fireplaces
description:
Bear Whisperer, exclusively designed for a couple and complete with beautiful views, is the perfect mountain retreat! Privately owned and operated, Bear Whisperer offers personal, thoughtful touches throughout including a chilled bottle of wine waiting for your arrival! ! Our large, one bedroom cabin is less than 3 mi. from downtown Gatlinburg and borders the Great Smoky Mountains National Park. Our location truly offers privacy and convenience! Come and make memories that will last a life time!

The space
From the moment you arrive at this charming cabin, a rustic, romantic atmosphere will surround you. Enjoy preparing meals in the fully equipped kitchen. The living area is a wonderful place to spend time as you snuggle up by the stone gas fireplace (operational October- March) on the leather sofa or comfy recliner and enjoy a DVD on the Blue-ray player from our collection, a movie via Netflix, or your favorite TV show on the 55 inch flat screen TV. The main level also features a game room with a full size pool table and game table. Games, playing cards and puzzles are provided for your convenience. Relax and enjoy the beautiful views as you sit out on the upper deck from the rocking chairs or the porch swing. A 1/2 bathroom is also located on the first floor. The lower level provides a romantic setting for two: Watch your favorite movies from the comfortable king size log bed on the 50 inch flat screen TV above a second cozy gas fireplace (operational October-March). A private area with Jacuzzi tub is just off the bedroom, as well as a large master bath with an over sized shower. You'll find a lower deck off the bedroom area where you will enjoy spending time in a large inviting hot tub while enjoying the lights of Gatlinburg and Pigeon Forge by night and the aerial tram and beautiful mountain views by day. You can plan a private cookout for two on the park-style charcoal grill located near the entry of the cabin. If you choose to go out for dinner, you will find excellent dining choices just a few miles down the mountain in downtown Gatlinburg or at Ober Gatlinburg. You may choose to drive a very short distance and park at Ober Gatlinburg and ride the Aerial Tram down the mountain to dine or shop in the many unique shops downtown. As a member of Chalet Village Owner's Club please use our membership card provided for access to three club houses on the mountain, each with pools (seasonal) and recreational areas. This card also offers discounts at numerous attractions and restaurants in the Gatlinburg area (a complete list is provided in our Visitor's Information Notebook in the cabin). Please comply with our no pet policy, our two person maximum occupancy policy, and our no smoking policy. You're sure to find this the perfect Smoky Mountain getaway!
Please visit our two other Airbnb listings. All three of our listings are 1 bedroom chalets in the Chalet Village area of Gatlinburg. If you like to travel with other couples our three chalets are a great choice!
airbnb.com/rooms/42511645
airbnb.com/rooms/2291435

Guest access
Our guests have private access to all of the cabin amenities listed as well as privileges offered at three Chalet Village Owner's Club locations including pools (seasonal), tennis courts, and game rooms. Travelers also have free access to all areas of the Great Smoky Mountains National Park including more than 80 hiking trails, numerous picnic areas and various seasonal programs and presentations offered free to visitors to the park by park rangers. Stop by Sugarlands Visitor Center for information about hiking trails, maps, and scheduled park sponsored events and programs.

Other things to note
We strive to include everything that our guests could desire at Bear Whisperer Cabin. Sitting high atop the ridge, it offers views of Gatlinburg, Pigeon Forge and the Tram to the north and the majestic towering Mt LeConte through the bordering National Park to the east and south. (Note that when the leaves are on the trees the views are partially obstructed.) We provide a detailed notebook for your convenience and brochures describing the many activities in Gatlinburg, Pigeon Forge and the Great Smoky Mountains National Park available during your stay. We are high atop Ski Mountain near the ski resort, Ober Gatlinburg, so it is important to note that you will be traveling on mountain roads to reach our elevation. The roads are in good shape, well-traveled, well-maintained by the city of Gatlinburg and do not require a 4WD vehicle unless a winter weather event occurs before or during your stay. Should roads become snow-covered, 4WD will be necessary to navigate the mountain roads and driveway. If you are lucky enough to experience the beauty of a Smoky Mountain snowfall, enjoy the gorgeous views and fun that await you! Ober Gatlinburg Ski Resort is just a mile away and the snow-capped mountains will provide a beautiful backdrop!

listing_name: Cozy Bear Mountain-Top Retreat Above the Clouds
description:
Mountain-Top condo just a short 10 minute drive from Downtown Gatlinburg. Sleep above the clouds surrounded by the spectacular Great Smoky Mountains. Our cozy 1 bedroom 1 bath hideaway sleeps up to 4.

Don't be surprised at all of the wildlife you will see in our community. Bear, deer, rabbits and wild turkey sightings are the norm here. Ample parking, gorgeous views and so much more will make you happy that you chose the Cozy Bear at High Chalet for your escape!

The space
This condo has a fully equipped kitchen to make home-cooked meals to enjoy in front of the fireplace or overlooking the beautiful mountain vistas. The condo is a short 10 minute drive from Downtown Gatlinburg along winding mountain roads where WiFi/Cell signal is unreliable. Please be prepared to use GPS. Secure personal WiFi available in condo.

Guest access
Full use of the condo except for a small locked owners closet. Heated seasonal outdoor pool, sauna, hot tubs and game room are a short walk to the Clubhouse. Hiking trails are available right out the front door - or visit the Sugarlands Visitor Center for hiking maps and information.

Other things to note
There are so many things to do in the area - plan your time well - because there will not be enough time to do everything!! Hiking, Skiing, Tubing, Skating, Horseback Riding, White Water Rafting, Zip-Lining, Shopping, Dinner Theaters, Dollywood, Moonshine Sampling....and plenty of restaurants to try!

Bears can get into cars - so please lock your car doors and do not leave food in the car to tempt them. Do not approach bears and do not feed them - or you may be their next meal!

Welcome to the Smokies- this area is packed with incredible things to do for every kind of traveler! Everyone has to visit the Great Smoky Mountains National Park, with its famous hikes and lookouts! If you’re more of a thrill seeker, you’ll enjoy Dollywood’s roller coasters, skiing at Ober Gatlinburg, ziplining, horseback riding, go-karts, white water rafting, river and snow tubing, and mountain coasters. If you’re on a girl’s trip, don’t forget to stop by the Pigeon Forge Tanger Outlets for amazing shopping, the Arts and Crafts district for unique gifts, the local wineries for a taste of the Smokies, and all the antique shops around Wears Valley! For the guys, play a round of golf at any of the beautiful courses, hit up a cigar shop, enjoy a moonshine tasting at Ole Smoky and Sugarlands, have fun with axe throwing, and even forge your own knife at one of the iron shops! Everyone will enjoy Ripley’s Aquarium, Anakeesta, putt-putt courses, strolling down Gatlinburg’s famous downtown, petting zoos, the Titanic Museum, Wonderworks, Alcatraz Museum, walking around the Island, the Gatlinburg SkyBridge, and all of the amazing restaurants and dinner shows. listing_name: Bearskin Lodge - Family Fun & Home Theater!
description:
Welcome large groups of friends, family, coworkers, or couples! Bearskin Lodge is your vacation destination for a group gathering in Gatlinburg, Tennessee. Nestled in The Glades of Gatlinburg Falls Resort, this 9-bedroom, 8-bathroom lodge sleeps up to 30 guests and features fun amenities and wonderful conveniences to help keep your large group happy, fed, and entertained throughout your stay in the Smoky Mountains.

The space
🛋 Living Room
Step into a warm and welcoming space designed for reconnecting and relaxation. Gather on plush seating around the gas fireplace, select a flick on the big screen TV, or enjoy storytelling moments over coffee. The open, airy layout connects effortlessly to the dining and kitchen areas, making it easy to keep conversations flowing throughout your visit.
• Gas fireplace with rustic stone surround
• Large flatscreen TV
• Plush sofas and generous seating
• Coffee table is ideal for board games or snacks

🍳 Kitchen + Dining
Cook side-by-side with loved ones in this chef-ready, double-appliance kitchen. With two fridges, ovens, dishwashers, and expansive counters, meal prep for large groups is a breeze. Enjoy shared moments over meals at multiple dining tables or the breakfast bar, and linger late into the evening.
• Dual refrigerators, ovens, dishwashers, and sinks
• Breakfast bar with seating for 6
• Three log dining tables seating 18 total
• Ample counter space for buffet-style meals

🎯 Recreation & Theater
When playtime calls, Bearskin Lodge delivers from top to bottom. Challenge friends to games in the rec room, settle in for a film in the home theater, or encourage kids to hang in the bunk room while snacks flow from the wet bar. There’s space, and fun, for every age.
• Pool table, air hockey, arcade & pinball machines
• Movie theater with tiered seating + big screen TV
• Bunk room with twin & queen bunks + wet bar
• Multiple seating zones for conversation or catch-up

🛏 Bedrooms & Bathrooms
With nine king suites and eight bathrooms, everyone—friends, family, or coworkers—can enjoy privacy and comfort. Each suite comes with its own TV and easy deck access. For growing groups, find sleeper sofas and bunk options to fill out the space.
• Nine king beds, each in its own suite
• Queen & twin bunk beds in shared bunk room
• Three sleeper sofas throughout
• Eight full bathrooms (jetted tubs included)

🌄 Outdoor Spaces
Elevate your outdoor experience on three large decks framed by Smoky Mountain trees. Soak away the day’s adventures in two hot tubs, sip moonshine in rocking chairs, or enjoy fireside chats in the private pavilion—as the dawn mist settles and the stars emerge.
• Three wraparound decks with seating
• Two hot tubs, open-air & stone-walled
• Pavilion with charcoal grill & picnic table
• Rocking chairs and fresh-air lounging spots

🧺 Essentials & Extras
Bearskin Lodge is stocked for easy group living, from laundry provisions to data-conscious tech. Enjoy connectivity (with light streaming), smooth arrivals, and in-home conveniences that help make every moment seamless.
• Free Wi-Fi (limited data—story-friendly!)
• Washer + dryer for on-site laundry
• Charcoal grill included
• Paved, motorcycle-friendly parking
• Limited data usage reminders apply

🚗 Nearby Attractions (driving distances)
• Ober Mountain (ski & tram) – 3 miles 🎿
• Ripley’s Aquarium of the Smokies – 2.5 miles 🐠
• Gatlinburg Arts & Crafts Community – 5 miles 🎨
• Great Smoky Mountains National Park entrance – 4 miles 🏞️
• Gatlinburg SkyBridge – 3 miles 🌉
• Dollywood (Pigeon Forge) – 10 miles 🎢
• Great Smoky Mountains Heritage Center (Townsend) – 12 miles 🎓

The full kitchen is stocked with all cookware, dishes, utensils, etc to prepare meals. You also have coffee pot, microwave, dishwasher, toaster, blender, etc.

The living room, both bedrooms, and game room all have flat screen TVs.

I am so excited to welcome you to our cabin - 811 Great Smoky Way, Gatlinburg TN 37738. The cabin will be ready for check in at 3pm.

The easiest way to find the cabin is to use GPS. If you do not have GPS - please let me know and I can provide you with written directions.

You will need to do the check in process on the Airbnb Mobile App the morning of your check in date. This will give you all the information you need including the address, door code, etc. You may want to screen shot this information so you will have it later.

To access the front door - go directly to the cabin (you do not need to stop at the resort desk). When you get to the front door - you will see a keypad. Tap to activate the lock - once it lights up you can enter your custom code you received when you did the check in process on the airbnb mobile app. The door will unlock.

If you need to access the internet - the wireless network is called \Mountain High”. There is no password. If you cannot connect for any reason - you should see several other wireless networks which do not require a key and you can connect to any of them.

Brenda Barker(PHONE NUMBER HIDDEN).

Frequently Asked Questions:
1. What Linens are included? - We provide linens for the beds, bath towels, and wash clothes. If you are not accustomed to reusing bath towels you may need to bring a few with you.
2. What household supplies are provided? - We get you started with 1 roll of paper towels, at least 2 rolls of toilet paper, Dish soap for dishes, and kitchen trash bags.

Welcome to the Smokies- this area is packed with incredible things to do for every kind of traveler! Everyone has to visit the Great Smoky Mountains National Park, with its famous hikes and lookouts! If you’re more of a thrill seeker, you’ll enjoy Dollywood’s roller coasters, skiing at Ober Gatlinburg, ziplining, horseback riding, go-karts, white water rafting, river and snow tubing, and mountain coasters. If you’re on a girl’s trip, don’t forget to stop by the Pigeon Forge Tanger Outlets for amazing shopping, the Arts and Crafts district for unique gifts, the local wineries for a taste of the Smokies, and all the antique shops around Wears Valley! For the guys, play a round of golf at any of the beautiful courses, hit up a cigar shop, enjoy a moonshine tasting at Ole Smoky and Sugarlands, have fun with axe throwing, and even forge your own knife at one of the iron shops! Everyone will enjoy Ripley’s Aquarium, Anakeesta, putt-putt courses, strolling down Gatlinburg’s famous downtown, petting zoos, the Titanic Museum, Wonderworks, Alcatraz Museum, walking around the Island, the Gatlinburg SkyBridge, and all of the amazing restaurants and dinner shows. No matter what you’re coming to the Smokies for, Auntie Belham’s offers an affordable vacation in comfortable cabins that you’ll be excited to return to after a day exploring this beautiful area!

Splash at 3 community swimming pools in summer, play pickleball, soak in your private hot tub year-round, and admire the serene partial mountain views from the deck.

The space
Watch drama, comedy, thriller, or romance DVDs on the big screen TV while cuddling on the sofa with a big bowl of popcorn from the fully equipped kitchen. Or play some games on the pool table. The dining area has a wooden table for mealtimes and board games together. You can even whip up a barbecue spread with the gas grill outside. listing_name: Big Bear Views Lodge - Easy Drive to Attractions!
description:
Where else can you stay that offers mountain and downtown views from multiple decks, modern and classic arcade games, a home theater with a 75-inch HD TV, a steamy outdoor hot tub, and 3 indoor garden tubs to relax? Big Bear Views Lodge offers these luxury amenities and more for your group getaway — including fireplaces in the bedrooms, king-size beds, a full kitchen, free Wi-Fi, rocking chairs, and an outdoor TV — in the Forrest Springs Community of Gatlinburg, TN!

The space
Living Room + Dining Area
The spacious living room is designed for gathering and making memories. Enjoy the warm ambiance of the electric fireplace, spread out on plush couches, and take in the stunning views from large windows that frame the Smokies. This space is perfect for relaxing after a day of sightseeing, sharing stories, or watching a movie together.
• Two sofas and a natural log bench
• Electric fireplace (no heat) and big screen TV
• Large wooden dining table with seating for 10
• Additional breakfast bar seating for 5
• Views of the mountains and trees through tall windows

Game Room + Theater
Head upstairs to a loaded game room with arcade games, air hockey, pool, and a 60-game Multicade. Enjoy thrilling races, classic games, and fun tournaments. A cozy lounge space and mountain views make this an ideal hangout spot day or night.
• Big Buck Hunter and Super Cars arcade cabinets
• Pool table, air hockey, and 60-game Multicade
• Wet bar for drinks between rounds
• 75-inch HDTV and Blu-ray player in the theater
• Theater-style seating for 20

Kitchen
Cooking for a (big) group is easy in the fully equipped kitchen. With ample counter space, major appliances, and a breakfast bar for five, cooking meals or setting out snacks is a breeze. Stock up at local markets and enjoy preparing group meals in this open, functional kitchen.
• Full-size refrigerator, oven, stove, and microwave
• Blender, toaster, and coffeemaker
• Ample counter space and breakfast bar for 5
• Double sink with modern fixtures

Bedrooms
Each bedroom offers a unique retreat with a mix of king beds and bunk beds to suit all types of travelers. Enjoy the charm of log furniture, electric fireplaces, and private garden tubs in select rooms. With TVs in every room, everyone can unwind with their favorite show at the end of the day.
• 4 king bedrooms and 1 bunk room with 2 queen-over-queen bunks
• 3 queen sleeper sofas throughout the home
• Private electric fireplaces in each bedroom
• Flat screen TVs and reading lamps
• 3 indoor garden tubs in en-suite bathrooms

Outdoor Spaces
Unwind on one of the decks with views of downtown Gatlinburg and the surrounding mountains. The outdoor hot tub and TV provide a luxurious way to relax under the stars. A picnic-style charcoal grill and flat, paved driveway with additional parking ensure convenience and comfort.
• Rocking chairs and double porch swings
• Outdoor hot tub with TV on the deck
• Picnic-style charcoal grill for cookouts
• Flat, paved driveway with parking for 7
• Overflow parking is available 100 yards away

Other Amenities
Wi-Fi, washer/dryer, and keyless entry make your stay more convenient. Pet-friendly accommodations mean your furry family members can join the fun. Overflow parking and minimal entry steps add to the ease of access.
• Washer and dryer
• Keyless entry for self-check-in
• Wi-Fi (light use only – not for streaming)
• Less than 3.5 miles to Great Smoky Mountains National Park

listing_name: On River Time - River View & Walking Distance
description:
Stay On River Time in Gatlinburg, Tennessee! Romantic nights and relaxing days await at this pet-friendly, 1-bedroom, 1-bathroom cabin for 2 (plus precious pups) in the Great Smoky Mountains. As the name suggests, you’ll be right on the river, so you can hear, see, and enjoy the rushing water. Sip coffee by the water’s edge on the patio, cast a line to fish for a while, or dine at the table on the screened deck — that happens to have a bubbly hot tub, too!

The space
Inside, take a rain shower in the bathroom or draw a hot bath in the clawfoot tub in the bedroom. Snuggle with your partner in the king-size bed while watching entertainment on the mounted TV or sit in the armchairs and chat or read for a spell. Moving into the living room, cozy and warm vibes hit you instantly. Classic cabin finishes mesh with modern luxuries to provide a comfortable and inviting space to unwind. Lounge on the sofa, play shows on the big screen TV, or drink moonshine by a crackling fire in the stone (gas) fireplace.

Hungry? Cook meals, grab snacks, and store treats in the fully equipped kitchen that features a retro fridge and an island with a farm sink, extra counter space, and bar seating for 2. Additional conveniences at this Gatlinburg river cabin include a flat, gravel driveway with parking for 2 vehicles, free Wi-Fi to stay connected, a washer and dryer to take care of washes as needed, a charcoal grill for cookouts, and keyless entry. Come see what On River Time means in the Smokies!

Other things to note
The river by the cabin is too shallow to fish in, and can be loud at times.

Additional amenities at this Gatlinburg river cabin include free Wi-Fi, a charcoal grill, a washer and dryer, a flat and paved driveway with parking for 3 vehicles, and keyless entry. description:
Family vacations, trips with friends, and couples’ getaways are welcome to stay and play at Siesta Ridge in Gatlinburg, TN. Nestled within Black Bear Falls Resort, this 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom cabin for 8 not only offers relaxing and entertaining amenities — including a steamy hot tub, a foosball table, and a fireplace — at the cabin but also provides community access to a swimming pool in the summertime, a clubhouse that has a full kitchen and a meeting room, plus a free Wi-Fi hotspot.

The space
Arrive at the cabin along the paved driveway, leave your bags at the door, and explore your vacation home together. The living room is open concept, with a high ceiling and exposed beams, a wall of windows showcasing the partial mountain view and treetops, and a stacked stone (gas) fireplace. Snuggle with your partner on the loveseat, plop on the couch to unwind with a DVD on the big screen TV, or relax in the armchair with a glass of wine by a crackling fire on cooler eves.

Nearby is the dining table, where you and your family or friends can enjoy homemade meals made in the kitchen. Galley style, the kitchen at Siesta Ridge is convenient and fully equipped with all the tools and stainless steel appliances needed to cook meals at the cabin. Plus, serving dishes, utensils, glasses, and mugs are provided so you don’t have to take up more space in the cars. All you need are the ingredients and any specialty items you may need. There’s even a charcoal grill outdoors for gun cookouts in the Smokies!

On the decks, you’ll find rocking chairs, a porch swing, and a steamy hot tub. Gaze out at the beautiful partial mountain views and towering trees while you chat with your bestie, sway away your worries and cares, and soak your aching muscles in the soothing water. Inside, you can play board games, shoot pool together, and video chat loved ones back home over the complimentary Wi-Fi. As bedtime draws near, slip into your PJs and enjoy entertainment in a king-size bed on a flatscreen TV. There are also 2 sleeper sofas and a washer and dryer in the home for added convenience during your memorable stay.

listing_name: BEAR MOON (Gatlinburg Luxury Log Cabin)
description:
Step into your new favorite place to call home! Come enjoy the beauty and wonder of the Smokies in a luxury hand hewn log cabin. This cabin will transport you to a place of wonder and allow you to settle in and feel at home before you go out and explore all that Gatlinburg, TN has to offer.

The space
This is a two-bedroom genuine Log Cabin located in a private setting in the desirable Chalet Village area of Gatlinburg, TN.

The decor adds to the charm and elegance of the cabin, which is constructed of hand-hewn logs and features hand-carved wood trim, both inside and out. The three-levels of this well decorated cabin include a long list of comforts and amenities.

Two king size bedroom suites and a sleeper sofa will comfort you after those long days of hiking in the Smoky Mountains. Each bedroom suite has a walk out deck on its level, closet, 2 dressers, Roku TV and private bathroom, so unpack those clothes and make yourself at home.

The Living Room is home to a Queen sized sofa sleeper, a loveseat recliner, 55in 4K Roku TV and DVD. Off of the living room is a sitting / office area. Grab your favorite book and enjoy your surroundings. We have a selection of books and games for your enjoyment. Free Wi-Fi is provided if you need to bring your work along with you, or just surf the net to check out all of the attractions that are nearby. You will find a fully stocked kitchen off the living room which includes all of the dishes, pots, pans, and utensils needed to make a down-home meal (we even have a crock-pot and full selection of spices for your convenience).

The Living room boasts a gas fireplace to keep you warm on those chilly days and nights. Fireplace season is during cooler months, typically October through March.

Entertainment options abound. A game room which includes a custom log pool table, recliners and electric fireplace, and multicade with 60 classic video games, 4K Roku TV/DVD and stereo system will keep kids as well as adults happy. listing_name: Mountain Sunrise
description:
Our beautiful rustic cabin sleeps up to 6 people comfortably. The cabin is located just up the road from the Greenbrier entrance to the Great Smokey Mountains National Park with miles of creeks and trails to explore and enjoy. There are also 3 outdoor swimming pools within the Cobbly Nob development or play golf at Bent Creek Golf course designed by three-time Masters and British Open Championship Winner Gary Player.

The space
Our beautiful cabin sleeps up to 6 people comfortably. There are 3 levels of living. On the main level there is a well equipped kitchen, dining area with a table and seating for 8. There is a comfortable reading area with a real wood fireplace, full bathroom and grill on huge back deck. The lower level boasts a very nice master bedroom with queen bed. The second bedroom provides 2 single beds. There is also a full bathroom and laundry facility. The upper level is an open loft area with TV viewing area and 2 single beds. The location is quiet but not too far away from all the action. Our favorite thing to do while relaxing at the cabin is sitting on the back deck and looking out at ridges of the National Park with a good cup of coffee.

Guest access
The whole property will be yours to enjoy.

Other things to note
This property was build by my father and his cousin in 1979. All timber was harvested locally and built with their own hands. Our family spent summers and holiday here while growing up and have so many wonderful memories that were made here. Now we just want to give others a chance to enjoy our little cabin and make their own memories.

• We have monthly pest control at all of our cabins.  Being in the Great Smoky Mountains, we are surrounded by nature and wildlife.  Ladybugs, millipedes, and other insects can be difficult to combat around this time of year, even with our constant pest control program in place.  It is not uncommon to see them occur in and around the cabin/condo, especially with the opening and closing of doors.  This is extremely common for the area and all cabins/condos.
• Being in the mountains, wind can sometimes blow leaves, dirt, or other natural debris into the hot tub. The hot tub has been drained and cleaned to ensure it’s ready for use.

listing_name: Chestnut: Beautiful Cabin in the best area.
description:
A TRUE MOUNTAIN CABIN. Chestnut Ridge is an All-Wood spacious 1900sqft (2/2+loft) Cabin. Centrally located to Gatlinburg /Pigeon Forge. Beautiful deck with outdoor dining and fantastic views, wood burning fireplace, covered hot tub. Ideal for One to Two families. Minimum rental age of 25 years. Strict no pet policy. 8 person Max Occupancy inclusive of children. Please Note: as of 1 Dec 2025, AirBnb's new One Price display is inclusive of cleaning fee and AirBnb 15.5% service fee.

The space
Chestnut Ridge is one of 5 family owned cabins we've built on the mountain and have decided to share on the rental market for all to enjoy. (See also Sunrise, Woodlands, Sunset and Pinecrest at Spindala Cabins).

The cabin is located in the most sought after area for Cabin Rentals in Gatlinburg/Pigeon Forge known as: Chalet Village North on Ski Mountain which is a 10 minute drive down the mountain to center of town. The cabin is up on the mountain on a knoll with a north facing view. The cabin has an easy access paved driveway with ample parking. Both king bedrooms are set up to accommodate adult couples. There is a full bathroom on each floor plus a 1/2 bath on the main floor, a large loft, large separate and fully equipped kitchen and dining area which is not in the living room, impressive great room with vaulted ceiling, beautiful deck with fantastic views and offers outdoor dining or just hanging out with friends. All new appliances black/stainless, central AC/Heat, a hard to find Wood Burning fire place (propane and electric just doesn't compare), full size washer/dryer and dishwasher. The hot tub is located in a standalone covered gazebo. The master bedroom is on the main floor with a king size bed and the the 2nd bedroom is upstairs with a King size bed. The loft has two sets of bunk beds and also a regulation Foosball table. There are 3 flat screen smart TVs in the bedrooms and above the fire place. And of course you’ll be able to stay connected via a strong complimentary WiFi connection. There is also an out door \Pilot Rock\" park style charcoal grill if you desire to grill out side. Our guests have access to all three club houses and (seasonal) swimming pools located in Chalet Village (see next to last picture).

We believe Chestnut Ridge is the kind of place you’ll want to return to year after year and hopefully think of as your own “home away”. Please feel free to ask us anything

listing_name: Great View! 1/2 mile to Gatlinburg Welcome Center
description:
2 Bed / 2 bath mountain cabin, with excellent mountain views. We are conveniently located 3 minutes from Gatlinburg & 7 minutes from Pigeon Forge. The cabin is decorated with a rustic, updated feel. The cabin was built and finished in NOV. 2017. Do we have a hot tub? Yes we do, and for added cleanliness, we drain, clean and refill the hot tub after every guest! The cabin has updated features such as tiled showers, granite counter tops, stainless steel appliances and all hard surfaced floors.

The space
Welcome to our custom-built mountain retreat, crafted in fall 2017 and nestled in the heart of the Smoky Mountains. Located between Gatlinburg and Pigeon Forge in the charming Chalet Village. Our cabin is less than a mile up the mountain from the Gatlinburg Welcome Center. It is a steep road going up, but it is worth it for the view. Our cabin offers stunning mountain views from three spacious decks. The home features a king and queen bedroom, two full bathrooms with tiled showers and granite vanities, and a queen sleeper sofa with a memory foam mattress for extra comfort. The modern kitchen is fully stocked with stainless steel appliances, a regular drip coffee maker, granite countertops, and all the essentials you need for a cozy meal in.

Relax on the main deck, complete with a hot tub, gas grill, and seating, perfect for enjoying the breathtaking mountain scenery. For entertainment, enjoy a foosball table and smart TVs in every room. With hardwood floors throughout, a 50” 4K smart TV, and cathedral wood ceilings in the living room, you’ll feel right at home in this thoughtfully designed space.

We take extra steps to ensure cleanliness and safety, including enhanced sanitizing protocols and two of the observation decks have no access to ground level to keep wildlife at bay. Guests also have access to the Chalet Village Owners Club, just a 2-minute drive away to the closest one, which includes pools, tennis, basketball. New pickleball courts will be available by Memorial Day 2024. The pools are outdoor pools so they are open from Memorial Day - Labor Day.

To make your stay effortless, we provide all linens, towels, and a starter supply of essentials like soap and paper products. With high-speed Wi-Fi and streaming capabilities on all smart TVs, you can stay connected while enjoying your mountain escape. We pride ourselves on offering a clean, welcoming home and will personally check in with you upon arrival to ensure your satisfaction.

We hope you’ll choose our cabin for a peaceful, enjoyable getaway. Smoking and pets are not permitted to maintain a healthy environment for all guests.

Guest access
You will be able to access the whole cabin and outdoor spaces

Other things to note
We are members of the Chalet Village Owners club. So you get to use the 3 clubhouse associated with our membership. The pools are only open from Memorial Day through Labor Day.
